from __future__ import annotations

import json
from pathlib import Path

from domain.video.stages import stage2_silence, stage7_subtitle, stage8_cover, stage9_organize


def test_stage2_prefers_auto_editor_when_available(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
    task_id = "v2"

    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE2_MODE", "auto")
    monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "_command_exists", lambda name: name == "auto-editor")
    monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "ffmpeg_exists", lambda: False)

    captured = {"cmd": []}

    def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        captured["cmd"] = list(args)
        out_idx = args.index("--output") + 1
        Path(args[out_idx]).write_bytes(b"auto-editor-output")
        return True, ""

    monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)

    result = stage2_silence.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id=task_id)
    assert result.success
    assert result.output_file
    assert Path(str(result.output_file)).exists()
    assert "--margin" in captured["cmd"]

    report = out_dir / task_id / "_stages" / f"{task_id}_stage2_silence_report.json"
    payload = json.loads(report.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    assert payload.get("method") == "auto_editor"


def test_stage2_strict_mode_rejects_copy_fallback(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
    task_id = "v2_strict"

    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE2_MODE", "auto")
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STRICT_EQUIVALENCE", "true")
    monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "_command_exists", lambda _name: False)
    monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "ffmpeg_exists", lambda: False)

    result = stage2_silence.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id=task_id)
    assert result.success is False
    assert "strict equivalence" in str(result.error_message)

    report = out_dir / task_id / "_stages" / f"{task_id}_stage2_silence_report.json"
    payload = json.loads(report.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    assert payload.get("method") == "strict_rejected"
    assert payload.get("fallback_used") is True


def test_stage2_silenceremove_codec_prefers_stage2_env(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
    target = tmp_path / "out.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE2_VIDEO_CODEC", "hevc_nvenc")
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_VIDEO_CODEC", "libx264")

    captured: list[list[str]] = []

    def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        captured.append(list(args))
        return True, ""

    monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)
    ok, error = stage2_silence._run_ffmpeg_silence_remove(source=source, target=target)  # type: ignore[attr-defined]

    assert ok is True
    assert error == ""
    assert len(captured) == 1
    assert captured[0][captured[0].index("-c:v") + 1] == "hevc_nvenc"


def test_stage2_silenceremove_codec_falls_back_to_global_env(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
    target = tmp_path / "out.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    monkeypatch.delenv("CLONECUT_STAGE2_VIDEO_CODEC", raising=False)
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_VIDEO_CODEC", "h264_nvenc")

    captured: list[list[str]] = []

    def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        captured.append(list(args))
        return True, ""

    monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)
    ok, error = stage2_silence._run_ffmpeg_silence_remove(source=source, target=target)  # type: ignore[attr-defined]

    assert ok is True
    assert error == ""
    assert len(captured) == 1
    assert captured[0][captured[0].index("-c:v") + 1] == "h264_nvenc"


def test_stage2_silenceremove_gpu_codec_failure_downgrades_to_libx264(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
    target = tmp_path / "out.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE2_VIDEO_CODEC", "h264_nvenc")

    captured: list[list[str]] = []
    calls = {"count": 0}

    def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        captured.append(list(args))
        calls["count"] += 1
        if calls["count"] == 1:
            return False, "No NVENC capable devices found"
        return True, ""

    monkeypatch.setattr(stage2_silence, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)
    ok, error = stage2_silence._run_ffmpeg_silence_remove(source=source, target=target)  # type: ignore[attr-defined]

    assert ok is True
    assert error == ""
    assert len(captured) == 2
    codecs = [cmd[cmd.index("-c:v") + 1] for cmd in captured]
    assert codecs == ["h264_nvenc", "libx264"]


def test_stage7_uses_burn_mode_before_mux(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
    task_id = "v7"
    stage_dir = out_dir / task_id / "_stages"
    stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    subtitle = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.srt"
    subtitle.write_text(
        "\n".join(
            [
                "1",
                "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000",
                "hello",
                "",
            ]
        ),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )

    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_MODE", "auto")
    monkeypatch.setattr(stage7_subtitle, "ffmpeg_exists", lambda: True)
    captured = {"cmd": []}

    def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        captured["cmd"] = list(args)
        Path(args[-1]).write_bytes(b"burned-video")
        return True, ""

    monkeypatch.setattr(stage7_subtitle, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)
    result = stage7_subtitle.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id=task_id)
    assert result.success
    assert result.output_file
    assert Path(str(result.output_file)).exists()
    assert "-vf" in captured["cmd"]

    manifest = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage7_subtitle_manifest.json"
    payload = json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    assert payload.get("method") == "burn_subtitle"


def test_stage7_strict_mode_rejects_copy_fallback(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
    task_id = "v7_strict"

    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_MODE", "auto")
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STRICT_EQUIVALENCE", "true")
    monkeypatch.setattr(stage7_subtitle, "ffmpeg_exists", lambda: False)

    result = stage7_subtitle.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id=task_id)
    assert result.success is False
    assert "strict equivalence" in str(result.error_message)

    manifest = out_dir / task_id / "_stages" / f"{task_id}_stage7_subtitle_manifest.json"
    payload = json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    assert payload.get("method") == "strict_rejected"
    assert payload.get("fallback_used") is True


def test_stage7_prefers_ass_subtitle_input(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
    task_id = "v7_ass"
    stage_dir = out_dir / task_id / "_stages"
    stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    srt = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.srt"
    ass = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.ass"
    srt.write_text(
        "\n".join(
            [
                "1",
                "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000",
                "hello srt",
                "",
            ]
        ),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )
    ass.write_text(
        "\n".join(
            [
                "[Script Info]",
                "Title: ass subtitle",
                "",
                "[Events]",
                "Format: Layer, Start, End, Style, Name, MarginL, MarginR, MarginV, Effect, Text",
                "Dialogue: 0,0:00:00.00,0:00:01.00,Default,,0,0,0,,hello ass",
            ]
        ),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )

    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_MODE", "burn")
    monkeypatch.setattr(stage7_subtitle, "ffmpeg_exists", lambda: True)
    captured = {"cmd": []}

    def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        captured["cmd"] = list(args)
        Path(args[-1]).write_bytes(b"burned-video")
        return True, ""

    monkeypatch.setattr(stage7_subtitle, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)
    result = stage7_subtitle.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id=task_id)
    assert result.success
    vf_expr = captured["cmd"][captured["cmd"].index("-vf") + 1]
    assert vf_expr.startswith("ass=")


def test_stage7_srt_burn_applies_resolution_adaptive_font_size(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
    task_id = "v7_font"
    stage_dir = out_dir / task_id / "_stages"
    stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    subtitle = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.srt"
    subtitle.write_text(
        "\n".join(
            [
                "1",
                "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000",
                "hello",
                "",
            ]
        ),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )

    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_MODE", "burn")
    monkeypatch.setattr(stage7_subtitle, "ffmpeg_exists", lambda: True)
    monkeypatch.setattr(stage7_subtitle, "_probe_video_resolution", lambda _source: (1920, 1080))
    captured = {"cmd": []}

    def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        captured["cmd"] = list(args)
        Path(args[-1]).write_bytes(b"burned-video")
        return True, ""

    monkeypatch.setattr(stage7_subtitle, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)
    result = stage7_subtitle.run(input_video=str(source), output_dir=str(out_dir), task_id=task_id)
    assert result.success
    vf_expr = captured["cmd"][captured["cmd"].index("-vf") + 1]
    assert "force_style='Fontsize=54'" in vf_expr


def test_stage9_archives_stage_artifacts(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
    task_id = "v9"
    stage_dir = out_dir / task_id / "_stages"
    stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    (stage_dir / "note.txt").write_text("stage artifact", encoding="utf-8")

    source = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage8_cover.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"final-video")

    result = stage9_organize.run(
        input_video=str(source),
        output_dir=str(out_dir),
        task_id=task_id,
        keep_intermediate_files=True,
    )
    assert result.success
    assert result.output_file

    final_path = out_dir / task_id / f"{task_id}_final.mp4"
    assert final_path.exists()
    legacy_final_path = out_dir / task_id / f"{task_id}.mp4"
    assert legacy_final_path.exists()

    archive_dir = out_dir / task_id / f"{task_id}_artifacts"
    assert archive_dir.exists()
    assert (archive_dir / "_stages" / "note.txt").exists()
    assert (out_dir / task_id / "logs" / "_stages" / "note.txt").exists()

    manifest = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage9_organize_manifest.json"
    payload = json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    assert payload.get("archive_dir")
    assert payload.get("final_output_dir") == str(out_dir / task_id)


def test_stage9_prefers_original_filename_for_final_directory(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
    task_id = "v9_forum"
    stage_dir = out_dir / task_id / "_stages"
    stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    source = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage8_cover.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"final-video")

    result = stage9_organize.run(
        input_video=str(source),
        output_dir=str(out_dir),
        task_id=task_id,
        keep_intermediate_files=True,
        forum_post_info={"original_filename": "璁哄潧鏍锋湰瑙嗛.mp4"},
    )
    assert result.success
    assert result.output_file
    final_path = Path(str(result.output_file))
    assert final_path.name == "璁哄潧鏍锋湰瑙嗛_final.mp4"
    assert final_path.parent.name == "璁哄潧鏍锋湰瑙嗛"


def test_stage8_writes_cover_title_artifacts(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
    task_id = "v8"

    monkeypatch.setattr(stage8_cover, "ffmpeg_exists", lambda: False)
    result = stage8_cover.run(
        input_video=str(source),
        output_dir=str(out_dir),
        task_id=task_id,
        forum_post_info={
            "cover_titles": [
                {"position": "up", "text": "涓绘爣棰?},
                {"position": "down", "text": "鍓爣棰?},
            ]
        },
    )
    assert result.success
    stage_dir = out_dir / task_id / "_stages"
    title_txt = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage8_cover_title.txt"
    manifest = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage8_cover_manifest.json"
    assert title_txt.exists()
    assert manifest.exists()
    payload = json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    assert payload.get("cover_title_lines") == ["涓绘爣棰?, "鍓爣棰?]


def test_stage8_applies_video_title_overlay_with_subtitle_timing(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
    task_id = "v8_overlay"
    stage_dir = out_dir / task_id / "_stages"
    stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    subtitle = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage7_correct_subtitles.srt"
    subtitle.write_text(
        "\n".join(
            [
                "1",
                "00:00:02,000 --> 00:00:04,000",
                "first subtitle",
                "",
            ]
        ),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )

    monkeypatch.setattr(stage8_cover, "ffmpeg_exists", lambda: True)
    captured = {"cmds": []}

    def fake_render_overlay(output_path, width, height, lines):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        Path(output_path).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        Path(output_path).write_bytes(b"overlay-image")
        return True, ""

    def fake_run_ffmpeg(args, timeout_seconds=1800):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        captured["cmds"].append(list(args))
        Path(args[-1]).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        Path(args[-1]).write_bytes(b"generated")
        return True, ""

    monkeypatch.setattr(stage8_cover, "_render_title_overlay_image", fake_render_overlay)
    monkeypatch.setattr(stage8_cover, "run_ffmpeg", fake_run_ffmpeg)

    result = stage8_cover.run(
        input_video=str(source),
        output_dir=str(out_dir),
        task_id=task_id,
        forum_post_info={"cover_titles": ["up-line", "down-line"]},
    )
    assert result.success

    manifest = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage8_cover_manifest.json"
    payload = json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    assert "video_title_overlay" in str(payload.get("method", ""))
    assert payload.get("overlay_duration_seconds") == 1.7

    overlay_cmd = captured["cmds"][-1]
    filter_expr = overlay_cmd[overlay_cmd.index("-filter_complex") + 1]
    assert "between(t,0,1.700)" in filter_expr


def test_stage8_strict_mode_rejects_when_overlay_not_applied(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = tmp_path / "input.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    out_dir = tmp_path / "out"
    task_id = "v8_strict"
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STRICT_EQUIVALENCE", "true")
    monkeypatch.setattr(stage8_cover, "ffmpeg_exists", lambda: False)

    result = stage8_cover.run(
        input_video=str(source),
        output_dir=str(out_dir),
        task_id=task_id,
        forum_post_info={"cover_title_up": "strict-title"},
    )
    assert result.success is False
    assert "strict equivalence" in str(result.error_message)

    stage_dir = out_dir / task_id / "_stages"
    manifest = stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage8_cover_manifest.json"
    payload = json.loads(manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    assert payload.get("strict_rejected") is True
    assert payload.get("fallback_used") is True

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import hashlib
import importlib.util
import json
from pathlib import Path
import sys
from types import SimpleNamespace
import time

import pytest

from apps.worker.service import NonRetryableUploadError, WorkerService
from domain.task.models import TaskStatus, TaskType, UnifiedTask


@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
def _set_fast_pipeline_env(monkeypatch) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    # Keep stage execution deterministic in CI/local without heavyweight ASR inference.
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_ASR_BACKEND", "sidecar")
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE2_MODE", "copy")
    original_find_spec = importlib.util.find_spec

    def fake_find_spec(name, package=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        if name == "funasr":
            return None
        return original_find_spec(name, package)

    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.worker.service.importlib.util.find_spec", fake_find_spec)


def _build_config(tmp_path) -> SimpleNamespace:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    ns_hash = hashlib.md5(str(tmp_path).encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
    namespace = f"clonecut_worker_unit_{ns_hash}:"
    return SimpleNamespace(
        redis_host="127.0.0.1",
        redis_port=6379,
        redis_db=0,
        redis_password="",
        redis_namespace=namespace,
        input_dir=str(tmp_path / "input"),
        output_dir=str(tmp_path / "output"),
        log_dir=str(tmp_path / "logs"),
        raw={
            "queue": {
                "max_retries": 2,
                "retry_backoff_seconds": [1, 1, 1],
            },
            "worker": {
                "max_download_workers": 1,
                "max_process_workers": 1,
                "max_upload_workers": 1,
                "download_timeout_seconds": 30,
                "download_chunk_size": 4096,
                "tts_enable": True,
                "tts_engine": "local",
                "use_internal_pipeline": False,
                "video_command_template": "",
                "retry_check_interval_seconds": 0.2,
                "zombie_timeout_seconds": 1,
                "zombie_check_interval_seconds": 0.2,
            },
        },
    )


def test_video_task_flows_download_process_upload(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source = tmp_path / "source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content")

    service.start()
    try:
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(
            {
                "task_type": "video",
                "source_url": str(source),
                "metadata": {"source": "unit"},
            }
        )
        assert ok
        assert not error
        assert task_id

        deadline = time.time() + 10
        final_task = None
        while time.time() < deadline:
            final_task = service.get_task(task_id)
            if final_task and final_task.get("status") == "completed":
                break
            time.sleep(0.05)

        assert isinstance(final_task, dict)
        assert final_task.get("status") == "completed"
        assert Path(str(final_task.get("source_path"))).exists()

        result = final_task.get("result")
        assert isinstance(result, dict)
        assert result.get("engine") == "internal_pipeline_auto"
        upload = result.get("upload")
        assert isinstance(upload, dict)
        uploaded_path = upload.get("uploaded_path")
        assert isinstance(uploaded_path, str) and uploaded_path
        assert Path(uploaded_path).exists()
    finally:
        service.stop()


def test_failed_task_auto_retries_until_success(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_retry.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    source = tmp_path / "retry-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content")

    original = service._process_video_like
    attempts = {"count": 0}

    def flaky_process(task):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        attempts["count"] += 1
        if attempts["count"] == 1:
            raise RuntimeError("inject process failure")
        return original(task)

    service._process_video_like = flaky_process  # type: ignore[method-assign]

    service.start()
    try:
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(
            {
                "task_type": "video",
                "source_url": str(source),
                "metadata": {"source": "retry-test"},
            }
        )
        assert ok
        assert not error

        deadline = time.time() + 15
        final_task = None
        while time.time() < deadline:
            final_task = service.get_task(task_id)
            if final_task and final_task.get("status") == "completed" and attempts["count"] >= 2:
                break
            time.sleep(0.1)

        assert attempts["count"] >= 2
        assert isinstance(final_task, dict)
        assert final_task.get("status") == "completed"
        assert int(final_task.get("retry_count", 0)) >= 1
    finally:
        service.stop()


def test_process_video_like_fast_fallback_for_tiny_placeholder_video(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_fast_fallback.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source = tmp_path / "tiny.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="tiny-video-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_path=str(source),
        metadata={"source": "unit"},
    )

    called = {"count": 0}
    original_run = sys.modules["apps.worker.service"].subprocess.run

    def fake_run(*args, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        called["count"] += 1
        return original_run(*args, **kwargs)

    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.worker.service.subprocess.run", fake_run)

    result = service._process_video_like(task)

    assert called["count"] == 0
    assert result.get("engine") == "internal_pipeline_auto"
    assert result.get("executed_mode") == "fallback_copy"
    output_path = result.get("output_path")
    assert isinstance(output_path, str) and output_path
    assert Path(output_path).exists()


def test_zombie_task_reclaimed_then_requeued(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_zombie.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    zombie = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="zombie-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_url=str(tmp_path / "missing.mp4"),
        status=TaskStatus.PROCESSING,
        current_stage=3,
        stage_checkpoint="stage3_repair",
        max_retries=1,
    )
    zombie.started_at = datetime.now() - timedelta(seconds=40)
    service._persist_task(zombie)

    reclaimed = service._reclaim_zombies_once()
    assert reclaimed == 1

    time.sleep(1.2)
    ready = service._dequeue_ready_retries()
    assert len(ready) == 1
    service._enqueue_retry_task(ready[0])

    queued = service.queue_adapter.pop_process(timeout=0.1)
    assert queued is not None
    assert queued.task_id == "zombie-1"
    loaded = service.get_task("zombie-1")
    assert isinstance(loaded, dict)
    assert loaded.get("status") == "pending"


def test_zombie_reclaim_uses_status_specific_thresholds(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_zombie_threshold.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["worker"]["zombie_timeout_by_status_seconds"] = {
        "pending": 1,
        "downloading": 120,
        "processing": 120,
        "uploading": 120,
    }
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    pending_task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="pending-zombie-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_url=str(tmp_path / "pending.mp4"),
        status=TaskStatus.PENDING,
    )
    pending_task.created_at = datetime.now() - timedelta(seconds=10)
    service._persist_task(pending_task)

    processing_task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="processing-fresh-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_url=str(tmp_path / "processing.mp4"),
        status=TaskStatus.PROCESSING,
    )
    processing_task.started_at = datetime.now() - timedelta(seconds=10)
    service._persist_task(processing_task)

    reclaimed = service._reclaim_zombies_once()
    assert reclaimed == 1

    pending_loaded = service.get_task("pending-zombie-1")
    processing_loaded = service.get_task("processing-fresh-1")
    assert isinstance(pending_loaded, dict)
    assert isinstance(processing_loaded, dict)
    assert pending_loaded.get("status") == TaskStatus.FAILED.value
    assert processing_loaded.get("status") == TaskStatus.PROCESSING.value


def test_internal_pipeline_executes_stage1_to_stage8(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source = tmp_path / "internal-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content")

    service.start()
    try:
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(
            {
                "task_type": "video",
                "source_path": str(source),
                "metadata": {"source": "unit"},
            }
        )
        assert ok
        assert not error
        assert task_id

        deadline = time.time() + 20
        final_task = None
        while time.time() < deadline:
            final_task = service.get_task(task_id)
            if final_task and final_task.get("status") == "completed":
                break
            time.sleep(0.1)

        assert isinstance(final_task, dict)
        assert final_task.get("status") == "completed"
        result = final_task.get("result")
        assert isinstance(result, dict)
        assert result.get("engine") == "internal_pipeline"
        executed = result.get("executed_stages") or []
        assert "stage1_transcode" in executed
        assert "stage8_cover" in executed
    finally:
        service.stop()


def test_attach_video_render_manifest_collects_primary_subtitle_cover_and_state(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_render_manifest.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / "render-manifest-task"
    task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    final_video = task_dir / "璁哄潧鏍锋湰_final.mp4"
    final_video.write_bytes(b"final-video")
    no_subtitle_video = task_dir / "璁哄潧鏍锋湰_鏅鸿兘鍓緫鏃犲瓧骞曠増.mp4"
    no_subtitle_video.write_bytes(b"no-subtitle")
    subtitle_srt = task_dir / "total.srt"
    subtitle_srt.write_text("1\n00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000\nhello\n", encoding="utf-8")
    subtitle_ass = task_dir / "total.ass"
    subtitle_ass.write_text("[Script Info]\n", encoding="utf-8")
    script_text = task_dir / "script.txt"
    script_text.write_text("鍘熷璇嗗埆鏂囨湰", encoding="utf-8")
    clip_text = task_dir / "clip_text.txt"
    clip_text.write_text("瑁佸壀鏂囨湰", encoding="utf-8")
    forum_post_info = task_dir / "forum_post_info.json"
    forum_post_info.write_text('{"thread_id":"123"}', encoding="utf-8")
    cover_image = task_dir / "璁哄潧灏侀潰鏍囬.png"
    cover_image.write_bytes(b"png")
    logs_dir = task_dir / "logs"
    logs_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    process_log = logs_dir / "funclip_20260326_150000.log"
    process_log.write_text("pipeline ok", encoding="utf-8")
    state_file = task_dir / "state.json"
    state_file.write_text(
        json.dumps(
            {
                "last_completed_step": 9,
                "output_file": str(final_video),
                "step_name": "鏂囦欢鏁寸悊",
            },
            ensure_ascii=False,
        ),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="render-manifest-task",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_path=str(tmp_path / "source.mp4"),
    )
    Path(str(task.source_path)).write_bytes(b"source-video")

    result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(
        task,
        {
            "success": True,
            "request_type": "video",
            "engine": "internal_pipeline",
            "output_path": str(final_video),
        },
    )

    artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []
    roles = {str(item.get("role")): item for item in artifacts}
    assert "final_video" in roles
    assert roles["final_video"].get("is_primary") is True
    assert "subtitle_srt" in roles
    assert "subtitle_ass" in roles
    assert "clip_text" in roles
    assert "forum_post_info" in roles
    assert "cover_image" in roles
    assert "processing_log" in roles
    assert "pipeline_state" in roles

    render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") or {}
    assert render_manifest.get("primary_artifact_id") == roles["final_video"].get("artifact_id")
    subtitles = render_manifest.get("subtitles") or {}
    assert subtitles.get("srt") == roles["subtitle_srt"].get("artifact_id")
    assert subtitles.get("ass") == roles["subtitle_ass"].get("artifact_id")
    texts = render_manifest.get("texts") or {}
    assert texts.get("clip_text") == roles["clip_text"].get("artifact_id")
    assert texts.get("script") == roles["transcript_text"].get("artifact_id")
    context = render_manifest.get("context") or {}
    assert context.get("forum_post_info") == roles["forum_post_info"].get("artifact_id")
    cover = render_manifest.get("cover") or {}
    assert cover.get("image") == roles["cover_image"].get("artifact_id")
    logs = render_manifest.get("logs") or {}
    assert logs.get("processing") == roles["processing_log"].get("artifact_id")
    pipeline_state = render_manifest.get("pipeline_state") or {}
    assert pipeline_state.get("last_completed_step") == 9


def test_internal_pipeline_context_maps_custom_backend_model_to_openai(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_context.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / "context-task"
    task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    source = tmp_path / "context-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="context-task",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_path=str(source),
        payload={"stage5_model_name": "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"},
        metadata={"source": "unit"},
    )

    options = service._prepare_internal_pipeline_context(task=task, task_dir=task_dir)

    assert options.get("model") == "openai"
    assert options.get("openai_backend_model") == "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"


def test_internal_pipeline_env_forces_utf8_and_backend_override(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_env.db"))
    ffmpeg_bin_dir = tmp_path / "ffmpeg-bin"
    ffmpeg_bin_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_FFMPEG_BIN_DIR", str(ffmpeg_bin_dir))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    env = service._build_internal_pipeline_env(
        pipeline_inputs={"openai_backend_model": "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"}
    )

    assert env.get("PYTHONIOENCODING") == "utf-8"
    assert env.get("PYTHONUTF8") == "1"
    assert env.get("OPENAI_BACKEND_MODEL") == "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"
    assert str(Path(sys.executable).resolve().parent) in env.get("PATH", "")
    assert str(ffmpeg_bin_dir.resolve()) in env.get("PATH", "")


def test_cancel_pending_task(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_cancel.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source = tmp_path / "cancel-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video")

    ok, task_id, error = service.submit(
        {
            "task_type": "video",
            "source_url": str(source),
            "metadata": {"source": "unit"},
        }
    )
    assert ok
    assert not error

    cancelled, cancel_error = service.cancel_task(task_id)
    assert cancelled
    assert cancel_error == ""

    task = service.get_task(task_id)
    assert isinstance(task, dict)
    assert task.get("status") == TaskStatus.CANCELLED.value


def test_manual_retry_failed_task(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_manual_retry.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source = tmp_path / "manual-retry.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video")
    failed = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="manual-retry-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_path=str(source),
        status=TaskStatus.FAILED,
        metadata={"failed_from_status": TaskStatus.PROCESSING.value},
    )
    service._persist_task(failed)

    ok, error = service.retry_task("manual-retry-1")
    assert ok
    assert error == ""

    task = service.get_task("manual-retry-1")
    assert isinstance(task, dict)
    assert task.get("status") == TaskStatus.PENDING.value
    metadata = task.get("metadata") or {}
    assert metadata.get("manual_retry") is True

    queued = service.queue_adapter.pop_process(timeout=0.1)
    assert queued is not None
    assert queued.task_id == "manual-retry-1"


def test_list_tasks_status_filter(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_list.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    pending = UnifiedTask(task_id="pending-1", task_type=TaskType.VIDEO, source="unit")
    failed = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="failed-2",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        status=TaskStatus.FAILED,
    )
    service._persist_task(pending)
    service._persist_task(failed)

    only_failed = service.list_tasks(status="failed", limit=20, offset=0)
    assert int(only_failed.get("total", 0)) >= 1
    tasks = only_failed.get("tasks") or []
    assert tasks
    assert all(item.get("status") == TaskStatus.FAILED.value for item in tasks)


def test_get_status_exposes_legacy_status_metrics(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_status_metrics.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    service._persist_task(UnifiedTask(task_id="status-pending", task_type=TaskType.VIDEO, source="unit"))
    service._persist_task(
        UnifiedTask(
            task_id="status-processing",
            task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
         …490 tokens truncated…           "source_url": str(source),
            "metadata": {"source": "unit"},
        }
    )
    assert ok
    assert not error
    assert task_id
    assert captured.get("ttl") == 321


def test_tts_task_without_adapter_raises_error(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_tts_disabled.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["worker"]["tts_enable"] = False
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    task = UnifiedTask(task_id="tts-disabled", task_type=TaskType.TTS, source="unit")
    with pytest.raises(RuntimeError):
        service._process_tts_like(task)


def test_tts_task_uses_local_engine_by_default(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_tts_local.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="tts-local-default",
        task_type=TaskType.TTS,
        source="unit",
        payload={"text": "internal tts"},
    )

    result = service._process_tts_like(task)
    assert result.get("success") is True
    assert result.get("engine") == "tts_local"
    output_path = Path(str(result.get("output_path")))
    assert output_path.exists()


def test_build_task_normalizes_forum_post_info_and_source_url(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_forum_normalize.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    task = service._build_task(
        {
            "task_type": "video",
            "source_url": "https://forum.example.com/thread-123-1-1.html",
            "payload": {
                "video_urls": ["https://cdn.example.com/demo_source.mp4"],
                "hotwords": ["蹇壀", "AI", "ai"],
                "cover_title_up": "涓婃爣棰?,
                "cover_title_down": "涓嬫爣棰?,
                "original_filename": "demo_source.mp4",
            },
            "metadata": {
                "source": "forum",
                "forum_post_info": {
                    "hotwords": ["蹇壀", "璁哄潧"],
                    "灏侀潰鏍囬涓?: "涓爣棰?,
                    "original_filename": "demo_source.mp4",
                },
            },
        }
    )

    assert task.source_url == "https://forum.example.com/thread-123-1-1.html"
    info = task.metadata.get("forum_post_info") or {}
    assert info.get("hotwords") == ["蹇壀", "璁哄潧", "AI"]
    assert info.get("cover_title_up") == "涓婃爣棰?
    assert info.get("cover_title_middle") == "涓爣棰?
    assert info.get("cover_title_down") == "涓嬫爣棰?
    assert info.get("灏侀潰鏍囬涓?) == "涓婃爣棰?
    assert info.get("灏侀潰鏍囬涓?) == "涓爣棰?
    assert info.get("灏侀潰鏍囬涓?) == "涓嬫爣棰?
    assert task.metadata.get("original_filename") == "demo_source.mp4"
    assert task.payload.get("original_filename") == "demo_source.mp4"


def test_download_source_video_prefers_original_filename(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_forum_download.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    source = tmp_path / "raw_input.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-download-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        source_url=str(source),
        metadata={"original_filename": "forum_named.mp4"},
    )

    local_path = Path(service._download_source_video(task))
    assert local_path.exists()
    assert local_path.name == "forum_named.mp4"
    assert local_path.read_bytes() == b"video-content"


def test_run_process_stage_applies_original_filename_naming(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_forum_naming.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source = tmp_path / "source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video")
    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-name-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        source_path=str(source),
        metadata={
            "source": "forum",
            "original_filename": "forum_final.mp4",
            "forum_post_info": {"original_filename": "forum_final.mp4"},
        },
    )
    service._persist_task(task)

    stage_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / f"{task.task_id}.mp4"
    stage_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    stage_output.write_bytes(b"processed-video")

    def fake_process_video_like(_task):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        return {
            "success": True,
            "request_type": "video",
            "engine": "internal_pipeline",
            "output_path": str(stage_output),
        }

    enqueued: dict[str, str] = {}

    def fake_enqueue(queue_name, queued_task):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        enqueued["queue"] = queue_name
        enqueued["task_id"] = queued_task.task_id

    service._process_video_like = fake_process_video_like  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    service._enqueue_task = fake_enqueue  # type: ignore[method-assign]

    service._run_process_stage(task)

    assert enqueued.get("queue") == "upload"
    assert enqueued.get("task_id") == task.task_id
    assert task.output_path is not None
    final_output = Path(task.output_path)
    assert final_output.exists()
    assert final_output.name == "forum_final.mp4"
    assert final_output.read_bytes() == b"processed-video"
    assert stage_output.exists()
    assert task.result is not None
    assert task.result.get("output_path") == str(final_output)
    assert task.result.get("original_output_path") == str(stage_output)
    assert task.result.get("named_output_path") == str(final_output)


def test_apply_video_output_naming_keeps_equivalent_final_output(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_forum_keep_final.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    final_output = tmp_path / "out" / "璁哄潧鏍锋湰瑙嗛" / "璁哄潧鏍锋湰瑙嗛_final.mp4"
    final_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    final_output.write_bytes(b"processed-video")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-keep-final-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        source_path=str(tmp_path / "source.mp4"),
        metadata={
            "source": "forum",
            "original_filename": "璁哄潧鏍锋湰瑙嗛.mp4",
            "forum_post_info": {"original_filename": "璁哄潧鏍锋湰瑙嗛.mp4"},
        },
        payload={"original_filename": "璁哄潧鏍锋湰瑙嗛.mp4"},
    )
    task.source_path and Path(task.source_path).write_bytes(b"video")

    result = service._apply_video_output_naming(
        task,
        {
            "success": True,
            "request_type": "video",
            "engine": "internal_pipeline",
            "output_path": str(final_output),
        },
    )

    assert result.get("output_path") == str(final_output)
    assert result.get("named_output_path") is None
    assert not result.get("original_output_path")
    assert (task.metadata or {}).get("named_output_path") == str(final_output)


def test_upload_output_replies_forum_with_strict_attachment(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_upload_forum.db"))
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_BASE_URL", "https://forum.example.com")
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_USERNAME", "tester")
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_PASSWORD", "secret")
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    output_file = tmp_path / "forum-output.mp4"
    output_file.write_bytes(b"video-bytes")
    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-upload-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        output_path=str(output_file),
        metadata={"forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "12345"}},
    )

    captured: dict[str, object] = {}

    class FakeReplier:
        def __init__(self, http_client, logger=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = logger
            captured["base_url"] = http_client.base_url

        def reply_with_attachments(self, thread_id, content, video_files, strict_attachment=False):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            captured["thread_id"] = thread_id
            captured["content"] = content
            captured["video_files"] = list(video_files)
            captured["strict_attachment"] = bool(strict_attachment)
            return True, ""

    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.worker.service.ForumReplier", FakeReplier)

    upload_result = service._upload_output(task)
    forum_reply = upload_result.get("forum_reply") or {}

    assert upload_result.get("success") is True
    assert upload_result.get("storage") == "local"
    assert forum_reply.get("attempted") is True
    assert forum_reply.get("success") is True
    assert forum_reply.get("thread_id") == "12345"
    assert captured.get("base_url") == "https://forum.example.com"
    assert captured.get("thread_id") == "12345"
    content = str(captured.get("content") or "")
    assert "馃幀 AI鏅鸿兘鍓緫瀹屾垚锛? in content
    assert "馃摑 鍘熷瑙嗛: 鏈煡鏂囦欢" in content
    assert "馃幆 澶勭悊缁撴灉: 1 涓増鏈? in content
    assert "馃摴 forum-output.mp4" in content
    assert "馃晵 澶勭悊鏃堕棿:" in content
    assert "馃 AI鍓緫鍔╂墜 - 鏅鸿兘瑙嗛澶勭悊瀹屾垚" in content
    assert captured.get("strict_attachment") is True


def test_upload_output_replies_forum_prefers_user_report(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_upload_forum_user_report.db"))
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_BASE_URL", "https://forum.example.com")
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_USERNAME", "tester")
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_PASSWORD", "secret")
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    output_file = tmp_path / "forum-output-user-report.mp4"
    output_file.write_bytes(b"video-bytes")
    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-upload-user-report-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        output_path=str(output_file),
        metadata={
            "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "12345"},
            "user_report": "杩欐槸鐢ㄦ埛渚ф姤鍛婂唴瀹?,
        },
    )

    captured: dict[str, object] = {}

    class FakeReplier:
        def __init__(self, http_client, logger=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = http_client
            _ = logger

        def reply_with_attachments(self, thread_id, content, video_files, strict_attachment=False):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            captured["thread_id"] = thread_id
            captured["content"] = content
            captured["video_files"] = list(video_files)
            captured["strict_attachment"] = bool(strict_attachment)
            return True, ""

    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.worker.service.ForumReplier", FakeReplier)

    upload_result = service._upload_output(task)
    forum_reply = upload_result.get("forum_reply") or {}

    assert upload_result.get("success") is True
    assert forum_reply.get("attempted") is True
    assert forum_reply.get("success") is True
    assert forum_reply.get("thread_id") == "12345"
    assert captured.get("thread_id") == "12345"
    assert captured.get("content") == "杩欐槸鐢ㄦ埛渚ф姤鍛婂唴瀹?
    assert captured.get("strict_attachment") is True


def test_upload_output_forum_4xx_is_non_retryable(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_upload_forum_4xx.db"))
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_BASE_URL", "https://forum.example.com")
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_USERNAME", "tester")
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_PASSWORD", "secret")
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    output_file = tmp_path / "forum-output-4xx.mp4"
    output_file.write_bytes(b"video-bytes")
    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-upload-4xx",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        output_path=str(output_file),
        metadata={"forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "12345"}},
    )

    class FakeReplier:
        def __init__(self, http_client, logger=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = http_client
            _ = logger

        def reply_with_attachments(self, thread_id, content, video_files, strict_attachment=False):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = thread_id
            _ = content
            _ = video_files
            _ = strict_attachment
            return False, "attachment upload failed: traditional upload failed: status=403"

    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.worker.service.ForumReplier", FakeReplier)

    with pytest.raises(NonRetryableUploadError):
        service._upload_output(task)


def test_fail_task_skips_retry_for_non_retryable_upload_error(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_upload_non_retryable.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="upload-no-retry-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        status=TaskStatus.UPLOADING,
        max_retries=2,
    )
    service._persist_task(task)

    service._fail_task(
        task=task,
        error=NonRetryableUploadError("attachment upload failed: status=403"),
        failed_from=TaskStatus.UPLOADING,
    )

    assert task.status == TaskStatus.FAILED
    assert task.retry_count == 0
    assert (task.metadata or {}).get("retryable_failure") is False
    assert "retry_due_at" not in (task.metadata or {})


def test_retry_delay_uses_upload_backoff_series(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_upload_backoff.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["queue"]["retry_backoff_seconds"] = [9, 9, 9]
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    upload_task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="upload-backoff-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        metadata={"failed_from_status": TaskStatus.UPLOADING.value},
    )
    process_task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="process-backoff-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        metadata={"failed_from_status": TaskStatus.PROCESSING.value},
    )

    assert service._retry_delay_seconds(upload_task, 0) == 1
    assert service._retry_delay_seconds(upload_task, 1) == 2
    assert service._retry_delay_seconds(upload_task, 2) == 4
    assert service._retry_delay_seconds(process_task, 0) == 9


def test_run_download_stage_parses_forum_post_and_writes_forum_info_snapshot(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_forum_parse_download.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source_media = tmp_path / "post-source.mp4"
    source_media.write_bytes(b"forum-video")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-parse-download-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        source_url="https://forum.example.com/thread-9876-1-1.html",
        status=TaskStatus.PENDING,
        metadata={"source": "forum"},
        payload={},
    )
    service._persist_task(task)

    parsed_called: dict[str, str] = {}

    def fake_parse(post_url):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        parsed_called["post_url"] = post_url
        return {
            "post_url": post_url,
            "thread_id": "9876",
            "post_id": "9876",
            "video_url": str(source_media),
            "video_urls": [str(source_media)],
            "original_filename": "forum_topic.mp4",
            "title": "forum title",
            "author_name": "alice",
        }

    queued: dict[str, str] = {}

    def fake_enqueue(queue_name, queued_task):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        queued["queue"] = queue_name
        queued["task_id"] = queued_task.task_id

    service._resolve_forum_post_download_info = fake_parse  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    service._enqueue_task = fake_enqueue  # type: ignore[method-assign]

    service._run_download_stage(task)

    assert parsed_called.get("post_url") == "https://forum.example.com/thread-9876-1-1.html"
    assert queued.get("queue") == "process"
    assert queued.get("task_id") == task.task_id
    assert task.source_path is not None
    downloaded_path = Path(task.source_path)
    assert downloaded_path.exists()
    assert downloaded_path.name == "forum_topic.mp4"
    assert downloaded_path.read_bytes() == b"forum-video"
    info_path = Path(str((task.metadata or {}).get("forum_post_info_path", "")))
    assert info_path.exists()
    snapshot = info_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    assert '"thread_id": "9876"' in snapshot
    assert '"original_filename": "forum_topic.mp4"' in snapshot


def test_run_download_stage_direct_source_skips_forum_parse_and_still_writes_snapshot(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_forum_direct_download.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source_media = tmp_path / "direct-source.mp4"
    source_media.write_bytes(b"direct-video")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-direct-download-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        source_url=str(source_media),
        status=TaskStatus.PENDING,
        metadata={
            "source": "forum",
            "forum_post_info": {
                "thread_id": "4321",
                "post_url": "https://forum.example.com/thread-4321-1-1.html",
                "original_filename": "direct_source.mp4",
            },
        },
        payload={},
    )
    service._persist_task(task)

    def should_not_call(_post_url):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        raise AssertionError("forum post parser should not be called for direct media source")

    queued: dict[str, str] = {}

    def fake_enqueue(queue_name, queued_task):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        queued["queue"] = queue_name
        queued["task_id"] = queued_task.task_id

    service._resolve_forum_post_download_info = should_not_call  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    service._enqueue_task = fake_enqueue  # type: ignore[method-assign]

    service._run_download_stage(task)

    assert queued.get("queue") == "process"
    assert queued.get("task_id") == task.task_id
    assert task.source_path is not None
    downloaded_path = Path(task.source_path)
    assert downloaded_path.exists()
    assert downloaded_path.name == "direct_source.mp4"
    info_path = Path(str((task.metadata or {}).get("forum_post_info_path", "")))
    assert info_path.exists()
Tool Result #175 shell_command call_s2VH2Y8DnI4meVPjsbUxgC2N exit 0 05:20:08
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: from __future__ import annotations from pathlib import Path import pytest from apps.api.openclaw_client import run_openclaw_video_tas...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

import pytest

from apps.api.openclaw_client import run_openclaw_video_task, submit_openclaw_video_task, wait_for_openclaw_result


class _FakeResponse:
    def __init__(self, status_code: int, payload):
        self.status_code = status_code
        self._payload = payload
        self.text = str(payload)

    def json(self):
        return self._payload


class _FakeSession:
    def __init__(self, post_responses=None, get_responses=None) -> None:
        self.post_responses = list(post_responses or [])
        self.get_responses = list(get_responses or [])
        self.post_calls = []
        self.get_calls = []

    def post(self, url, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        self.post_calls.append({"url": url, **kwargs})
        if not self.post_responses:
            raise AssertionError("unexpected post call")
        return self.post_responses.pop(0)

    def get(self, url, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        self.get_calls.append({"url": url, **kwargs})
        if not self.get_responses:
            raise AssertionError("unexpected get call")
        return self.get_responses.pop(0)


def test_submit_openclaw_video_task_posts_expected_form(tmp_path) -> None:
    video = tmp_path / "sample.mp4"
    video.write_bytes(b"video")
    session = _FakeSession(
        post_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                201,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-123",
                    "openclaw_result_url": "/api/tasks/task-123/openclaw-result",
                },
            )
        ]
    )

    payload = submit_openclaw_video_task(
        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
        video_path=video,
        api_token="token-1",
        stage5_model_name="yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4",
        extra_form={"metadata": {"source": "test"}},
        session=session,
    )

    assert payload.get("task_id") == "task-123"
    call = session.post_calls[0]
    assert call["url"] == "http://127.0.0.1:18100/api/tasks/upload-video"
    assert call["headers"]["Authorization"] == "Bearer token-1"
    assert call["data"]["stage5_model_name"] == "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"
    assert call["data"]["metadata"] == '{"source": "test"}'
    uploaded_name, _, uploaded_content_type = call["files"]["file"]
    assert uploaded_name == "sample.mp4"
    assert uploaded_content_type == "video/mp4"


def test_wait_for_openclaw_result_polls_until_completed(monkeypatch) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    session = _FakeSession(
        get_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                200,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-123",
                    "openclaw_result": {"status": "processing"},
                },
            ),
            _FakeResponse(
                200,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-123",
                    "openclaw_result": {"status": "completed", "outputs": {"final_video": {"artifact_id": "final"}}},
                },
            ),
        ]
    )
    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.api.openclaw_client.time.sleep", lambda _seconds: None)

    payload = wait_for_openclaw_result(
        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
        task_id="task-123",
        poll_interval_seconds=0.2,
        session=session,
    )

    assert payload.get("openclaw_result", {}).get("status") == "completed"
    assert len(session.get_calls) == 2


def test_run_openclaw_video_task_returns_submit_and_result(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    video = tmp_path / "sample.mp4"
    video.write_bytes(b"video")
    session = _FakeSession(
        post_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                201,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-789",
                },
            )
        ],
        get_responses=[
            _FakeResponse(
                200,
                {
                    "success": True,
                    "task_id": "task-789",
                    "openclaw_result": {"status": "completed"},
                },
            )
        ],
    )
    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.api.openclaw_client.time.sleep", lambda _seconds: None)

    payload = run_openclaw_video_task(
        api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
        video_path=video,
        wait=True,
        session=session,
    )

    assert payload.get("submit", {}).get("task_id") == "task-789"
    assert payload.get("result", {}).get("openclaw_result", {}).get("status") == "completed"


def test_submit_openclaw_video_task_requires_existing_file(tmp_path) -> None:
    missing = Path(tmp_path / "missing.mp4")
    with pytest.raises(FileNotFoundError):
        submit_openclaw_video_task(
            api_base="http://127.0.0.1:18100",
            video_path=missing,
        )

Output:
            if not source_path or not Path(source_path).exists():
                raise RuntimeError("internal pipeline requires a valid source_path")
            engine = "internal_pipeline"
            if not self.internal_pipeline_enabled:
                engine = "internal_pipeline_auto"
            result = self._run_internal_video_pipeline(task=task, source_path=source_path)
            result["engine"] = engine
            return result

        if self.video_adapter.is_enabled():
            result = self.video_adapter.process(task)
            task.current_stage = 9
            task.stage_checkpoint = "video_command"
            return result

        raise RuntimeError("no video engine configured")

    def _run_internal_video_pipeline(self, task: UnifiedTask, source_path: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        stage_names = [
            "stage0_clean",
            "stage1_transcode",
            "stage2_silence",
            "stage3_repair",
            "stage4_asr",
            "stage5_ai_text",
            "stage6_clip",
            "stage6_5_resub",
            "stage7_correct",
            "stage7_subtitle",
            "stage8_cover",
            "stage9_organize",
        ]
        # Internal pipeline is currently executed as a full run for determinism.
        start_from_stage = 0

        task_dir = Path(self.config.output_dir) / task.task_id
        task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

        source = Path(source_path)
        if not source.exists():
            task.stage_checkpoint = stage_names[start_from_stage]
            task.current_stage = start_from_stage
            raise RuntimeError(f"source file not found: {source}")

        repo_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
        pipeline_script = repo_root / "domain" / "video" / "pre" / "main" / "pipeline.py"
        if not pipeline_script.exists():
            raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline script missing: {pipeline_script}")

        timeout_raw = self._get_worker_cfg("internal_pipeline_timeout_seconds", 7200)
        try:
            timeout_seconds = max(60, int(timeout_raw))
        except Exception:
            timeout_seconds = 7200

        pipeline_inputs = self._prepare_internal_pipeline_context(task=task, task_dir=task_dir)

        if self.internal_pipeline_runner is not None:
            warm_payload = {
                "repo_root": str(repo_root),
                "input_path": str(source),
                "output_dir": str(task_dir),
                "model": str(pipeline_inputs.get("model") or "").strip() or None,
                "file_encoding": str(pipeline_inputs.get("file_encoding") or "").strip() or None,
                "enable_preprocess": "stage5_use_preprocessor" in pipeline_inputs
                and bool(pipeline_inputs.get("stage5_use_preprocessor")),
                "disable_preprocess": "stage5_use_preprocessor" in pipeline_inputs
                and not bool(pipeline_inputs.get("stage5_use_preprocessor")),
                "clip_text": str(pipeline_inputs.get("clip_text") or "").strip() or None,
                "clip_text_file": str(pipeline_inputs.get("clip_text_file") or "").strip() or None,
                "forum_post_info_json": str(pipeline_inputs.get("forum_post_info_json") or "").strip() or None,
                "organize_delete_original": "false",
                "env": self._build_internal_pipeline_env(pipeline_inputs=pipeline_inputs),
            }
            try:
                started = time.perf_counter()
                self.internal_pipeline_runner.execute(
                    payload=warm_payload,
                    timeout_seconds=timeout_seconds,
                )
                elapsed_ms = int(max(0.0, (time.perf_counter() - started) * 1000))
                output_path = self._resolve_internal_pipeline_output_path(task_dir=task_dir, source_path=source)
                executed = stage_names[start_from_stage:]
                task.current_stage = len(stage_names) - 1
                task.stage_checkpoint = stage_names[-1]
                return {
                    "success": True,
                    "request_type": task.task_type.value,
                    "output_path": str(output_path),
                    "executed_stages": executed,
                    "executed_mode": "real_pipeline",
                    "performance_summary": (
                        f"internal pipeline executed stages={len(executed)} "
                        f"duration_ms={elapsed_ms} backend=warm_process"
                    ),
                }
            except Exception as exc:
                self.logger.warning(
                    "warm internal pipeline failed, fallback to subprocess: task_id=%s err=%s",
                    task.task_id,
                    exc,
                )

        cmd = [
            sys.executable,
            str(pipeline_script),
            "--input",
            str(source),
            "--output",
            str(task_dir),
        ]
        self._append_internal_pipeline_args(cmd=cmd, pipeline_inputs=pipeline_inputs)
        if importlib.util.find_spec("funasr") is None:
            return self._run_internal_video_pipeline_fallback_copy(
                task=task,
                source=source,
                task_dir=task_dir,
                stage_names=stage_names,
                start_from_stage=start_from_stage,
                reason="missing dependency: funasr",
            )
        try:
            started = time.perf_counter()
            proc = subprocess.run(
                cmd,
                cwd=str(repo_root),
                capture_output=True,
                text=True,
                encoding="utf-8",
                errors="replace",
                env=self._build_internal_pipeline_env(pipeline_inputs=pipeline_inputs),
                timeout=timeout_seconds,
            )
            elapsed_ms = int(max(0.0, (time.perf_counter() - started) * 1000))

            if proc.returncode != 0:
                combined = "\n".join(
                    [str(proc.stdout or "").strip(), str(proc.stderr or "").strip()]
                ).strip()
                tail_lines = [line for line in combined.splitlines() if line.strip()][-20:]
                tail_text = "\n".join(tail_lines)
                raise RuntimeError(
                    f"internal pipeline failed: exit={proc.returncode} "
                    f"timeout={timeout_seconds}s tail=\n{tail_text}"
                )

            output_path = self._resolve_internal_pipeline_output_path(task_dir=task_dir, source_path=source)
            executed = stage_names[start_from_stage:]
            task.current_stage = len(stage_names) - 1
            task.stage_checkpoint = stage_names[-1]
            return {
                "success": True,
                "request_type": task.task_type.value,
                "output_path": str(output_path),
                "executed_stages": executed,
                "executed_mode": "real_pipeline",
                "performance_summary": (
                    f"internal pipeline executed stages={len(executed)} "
                    f"duration_ms={elapsed_ms} command={' '.join(cmd)}"
                ),
            }
        except Exception as exc:
            self.logger.warning(
                "internal pipeline unavailable, fallback to copy mode: task_id=%s err=%s",
                task.task_id,
                exc,
            )
            return self._run_internal_video_pipeline_fallback_copy(
                task=task,
                source=source,
                task_dir=task_dir,
                stage_names=stage_names,
                start_from_stage=start_from_stage,
                reason=str(exc),
            )

    def _prepare_internal_pipeline_context(self, task: UnifiedTask, task_dir: Path) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        payload = task.payload if isinstance(task.payload, dict) else {}
        metadata = task.metadata if isinstance(task.metadata, dict) else {}
        options: Dict[str, Any] = {}
Tool Result #190 shell_command call_VxMzYXHtsvyBlbY79qW8z7YM exit 0 05:20:48
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: def _attach_video_render_manifest(self, task: UnifiedTask, result: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]: normalized_result = dict(result...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:

    def _attach_video_render_manifest(self, task: UnifiedTask, result: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        normalized_result = dict(result or {})
        artifacts = self._collect_video_artifacts(task=task, result=normalized_result)
        if not artifacts:
            return normalized_result

        render_manifest = self._build_video_render_manifest(
            task=task,
            result=normalized_result,
            artifacts=artifacts,
        )
        normalized_result["artifacts"] = artifacts
        normalized_result["render_manifest"] = render_manifest
        return normalized_result

    def _collect_video_artifacts(self, task: UnifiedTask, result: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        task_dir = Path(self.config.output_dir) / task.task_id
        output_path = str(result.get("output_path") or "").strip()
        named_output_path = str(result.get("named_output_path") or "").strip()
        original_output_path = str(result.get("original_output_path") or "").strip()
        preferred_primary_path = output_path or named_output_path or original_output_path
        primary_resolved = self._safe_resolve_existing_path(preferred_primary_path)

        candidate_files: Dict[str, Path] = {}
        for raw_path in (output_path, named_output_path, original_output_path):
            resolved = self._safe_resolve_existing_path(raw_path)
            if resolved is not None:
                candidate_files[str(resolved)] = resolved

        candidate_dirs: List[Path] = []
        for raw_dir in (
            str(task_dir),
            str(Path(output_path).parent) if output_path else "",
            str(Path(named_output_path).parent) if named_output_path else "",
            str(Path(original_output_path).parent) if original_output_path else "",
        ):
            resolved_dir = self._safe_resolve_existing_dir(raw_dir)
            if resolved_dir is None:
                continue
            if resolved_dir not in candidate_dirs:
                candidate_dirs.append(resolved_dir)

        for base_dir in candidate_dirs:
            try:
                files = sorted(
                    [path for path in base_dir.rglob("*") if path.is_file()],
                    key=lambda item: str(item).lower(),
                )
            except Exception:
                continue
            for path in files:
                if not self._should_expose_video_artifact(path):
                    continue
                resolved = self._safe_resolve_existing_path(str(path))
                if resolved is None:
                    continue
                candidate_files[str(resolved)] = resolved

        artifacts: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
        used_ids: set[str] = set()
        task_dir_resolved = self._safe_resolve_existing_dir(str(task_dir))
        sorted_files = sorted(
            candidate_files.values(),
            key=lambda item: self._video_artifact_sort_key(
                path=item,
                primary_resolved=primary_resolved,
            ),
        )
        single_artifact_roles = {
            "final_video",
            "video_subtitled",
            "video_no_subtitle",
            "coverless_video",
            "subtitle_srt",
            "subtitle_ass",
            "transcript_text",
            "clip_text",
            "forum_post_info",
            "cover_image",
            "cover_manifest",
            "processing_log",
            "pipeline_state",
            "video",
        }
        selected_files: List[Tuple[Path, str, str]] = []
        seen_roles: set[str] = set()
        for path in sorted_files:
            role, kind = self._classify_video_artifact_role(
                path=path,
                primary_resolved=primary_resolved,
            )
            if role in single_artifact_roles and role in seen_roles:
                continue
            seen_roles.add(role)
            selected_files.append((path, role, kind))

        for index, artifact_info in enumerate(selected_files, start=1):
            path, role, kind = artifact_info
            artifact_id = self._build_video_artifact_id(
                role=role,
                index=index,
                used_ids=used_ids,
            )
            relative_path = self._build_artifact_relative_path(path=path, task_dir=task_dir_resolved)
            stat = path.stat()
            artifacts.append(
                {
                    "artifact_id": artifact_id,
                    "kind": kind,
                    "role": role,
                    "filename": path.name,
                    "path": str(path),
                    "relative_path": relative_path,
                    "size_bytes": int(stat.st_size),
                    "is_primary": primary_resolved is not None and path == primary_resolved,
                }
            )
        return artifacts

    def _build_video_render_manifest(
        self,
        task: UnifiedTask,
        result: Dict[str, Any],
        artifacts: List[Dict[str, Any]],
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        primary_artifact_id = ""
        videos: Dict[str, str] = {}
        subtitles: Dict[str, str] = {}
        texts: Dict[str, str] = {}
        context: Dict[str, str] = {}
        logs: Dict[str, str] = {}
        cover: Dict[str, str] = {}
        pipeline_state: Dict[str, Any] = {}

        for artifact in artifacts:
            artifact_id = str(artifact.get("artifact_id") or "").strip()
            role = str(artifact.get("role") or "").strip()
            path_text = str(artifact.get("path") or "").strip()
            if artifact.get("is_primary") and artifact_id:
                primary_artifact_id = artifact_id

            if role == "final_video" and artifact_id:
                videos["primary"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "video_subtitled" and artifact_id and "subtitled" not in videos:
                videos["subtitled"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "video_no_subtitle" and artifact_id:
                videos["no_subtitle"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "coverless_video" and artifact_id:
                videos["coverless"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "video" and artifact_id and "alternate" not in videos:
                videos["alternate"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "subtitle_srt" and artifact_id:
                subtitles["srt"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "subtitle_ass" and artifact_id:
                subtitles["ass"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "transcript_text" and artifact_id:
                subtitles["script"] = artifact_id
                texts["script"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "clip_text" and artifact_id:
                texts["clip_text"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "forum_post_info" and artifact_id:
                context["forum_post_info"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "cover_image" and artifact_id and "image" not in cover:
                cover["image"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "cover_manifest" and artifact_id:
                cover["manifest"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "processing_log" and artifact_id and "processing" not in logs:
                logs["processing"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "pipeline_state" and artifact_id:
                pipeline_state = {
                    "artifact_id": artifact_id,
                    "path": path_text,
                }
                pipeline_state.update(self._read_pipeline_state_summary(path_text))

        manifest: Dict[str, Any] = {
            "task_id": task.task_id,
            "artifact_count": len(artifacts),
            "primary_artifact_id": primary_artifact_id,
            "primary_output_path": str(result.get("output_path") or "").strip(),
            "videos": videos,
            "subtitles": subtitles,
            "cover": cover,
        }
        if texts:
            manifest["texts"] = texts
        if context:
            manifest["context"] = context
        if logs:
            manifest["logs"] = logs
        if pipeline_state:
            manifest["pipeline_state"] = pipeline_state
        return manifest

    def _safe_resolve_existing_path(self, value: str) -> Optional[Path]:
        text = str(value or "").strip()
        if not text:
            return None
        candidate = Path(text)
        if not candidate.exists() or not candidate.is_file():
            return None
        try:
            return candidate.resolve()
        except Exception:
            return candidate

    def _safe_resolve_existing_dir(self, value: str) -> Optional[Path]:
        text = str(value or "").strip()
        if not text:
            return None
        candidate = Path(text)
        if not candidate.exists() or not candidate.is_dir():
            return None
        try:
            return candidate.resolve()
        except Exception:
            return candidate

    def _should_expose_video_artifact(self, path: Path) -> bool:
