    assert pipeline_state.get("last_completed_step") == 9


def test_internal_pipeline_context_keeps_only_forum_snapshot_and_clip_text(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_context.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / "context-task"
    task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    source = tmp_path / "context-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="context-task",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_path=str(source),
        payload={
            "clip_text": "user clip text",
            "stage5_model_name": "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4",
            "file_encoding": "utf-8",
            "stage5_use_preprocessor": True,
        },
        metadata={
            "source": "unit",
            "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123"},
            "openai_backend_model": "legacy-model-id",
        },
    )

    options = service._prepare_internal_pipeline_context(task=task, task_dir=task_dir)

    assert "forum_post_info_json" in options
    assert "clip_text_file" in options
    assert "model" not in options
    assert "openai_backend_model" not in options
    assert "file_encoding" not in options
    assert "stage5_use_preprocessor" not in options
    assert (task_dir / "clip_text.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8") == "user clip text"


def test_internal_pipeline_env_forces_utf8_and_backend_override(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_env.db"))
    ffmpeg_bin_dir = tmp_path / "ffmpeg-bin"
    ffmpeg_bin_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_FFMPEG_BIN_DIR", str(ffmpeg_bin_dir))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    env = service._build_internal_pipeline_env(
        pipeline_inputs={"openai_backend_model": "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"}
    )

    assert env.get("PYTHONIOENCODING") == "utf-8"
    assert env.get("PYTHONUTF8") == "1"
    assert env.get("OPENAI_BACKEND_MODEL") == "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4"
    assert str(Path(sys.executable).resolve().parent) in env.get("PATH", "")
    assert str(ffmpeg_bin_dir.resolve()) in env.get("PATH", "")


def test_cancel_pending_task(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any
from typing import Optional

from .base import StageResult
from .utils import ensure_stage_dir, stage_artifact_path


def run_stage5_ai_text(
    input_video: str,
    output_dir: str,
    task_id: str,
    *,
    forum_post_info: Optional[dict] = None,
) -> StageResult:
    source = Path(input_video)
    stage_dir = ensure_stage_dir(output_dir, task_id)
    task_root = Path(output_dir) / task_id
    if not source.exists():
        return StageResult(success=False, output_file=input_video, error_message="stage5 input missing")

    script_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage5_ai_script", ".txt")
    pointer_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage5_script_path", ".txt")
    manifest_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage5_ai_manifest", ".json")
    clip_text_path = task_root / "clip_text.txt"
    script_text = "Script Draft\n\nKey Points:\n- skeleton output\n"
    script_path.write_text(script_text, encoding="utf-8")
    if not clip_text_path.exists():
        clip_text_path.write_text(script_text, encoding="utf-8")
    pointer_path.write_text(str(script_path), encoding="utf-8")
    use_forum_keywords = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STAGE5_USE_FORUM_KEYWORDS", "true").strip().lower() == "true"
    hotwords = []
    raw_hotwords = forum_post_info.get("hotwords", []) if isinstance(forum_post_info, dict) else []
    if use_forum_keywords:
        seen: set[str] = set()
        for item in raw_hotwords:
            text = str(item).strip()
            if not text or text in seen:
                continue
            seen.add(text)
            hotwords.append(text)
    llm_use_factory = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STAGE5_LLM_USE_FACTORY", "false").strip().lower() == "true"
    llm_provider = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STAGE5_LLM_PROVIDER", "rule").strip().lower()
    strict = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STRICT_EQUIVALENCE", "false").strip().lower() == "true"
    engine = "rule_based"
    llm_error = ""
    fallback_used = False
    strict_rejected = False
    if llm_use_factory and llm_provider == "rule":
        engine = "llm_factory:rule"
    elif llm_use_factory and llm_provider != "rule":
        engine = "rule_based"
        llm_error = "missing api_key for provider"
        fallback_used = True
        if strict:
            strict_rejected = True

    manifest_path.write_text(
        json.dumps(
            {
                "task_id": task_id,
                "forum_post_info": forum_post_info or {},
                "engine": engine,
                "keywords": hotwords,
                "use_forum_keywords": use_forum_keywords,
                "forum_keyword_count": len(hotwords),
                "llm_use_factory": llm_use_factory,
                "llm_error": llm_error,
                "fallback_used": fallback_used,
                "strict_rejected": strict_rejected,
            },
            ensure_ascii=False,
            indent=2,
        ),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )
    if strict_rejected:
        return StageResult(
            success=False,
            output_file=str(source),
            error_message="strict equivalence rejected stage5 fallback",
            artifacts={"manifest_file": str(manifest_path)},
        )
    return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(source), artifacts={"manifest_file": str(manifest_path)})


def run(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> StageResult:
    return run_stage5_ai_text(*args, **kwargs)

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path
from types import SimpleNamespace

import apps.worker.service as worker_service_module
from apps.worker.service import WorkerService
from domain.task.models import TaskType, UnifiedTask


def _build_config(tmp_path, *, runner_mode: str = "subprocess") -> SimpleNamespace:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    return SimpleNamespace(
        redis_host="127.0.0.1",
        redis_port=6379,
        redis_db=0,
        redis_password="",
        redis_namespace="clonecut_worker_test:",
        input_dir=str(tmp_path / "input"),
        output_dir=str(tmp_path / "output"),
        log_dir=str(tmp_path / "logs"),
        raw={
            "queue": {
                "max_retries": 1,
                "retry_backoff_seconds": [1],
            },
            "worker": {
                "max_download_workers": 1,
                "max_process_workers": 1,
                "max_upload_workers": 1,
                "use_internal_pipeline": True,
                "internal_pipeline_runner": runner_mode,
                "internal_pipeline_pool_size": 1,
                "internal_pipeline_warmup_on_start": False,
                "video_command_template": "",
            },
        },
    )


def _build_task(source: Path) -> UnifiedTask:
    return UnifiedTask(
        task_id="video-task-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit-test",
        source_path=str(source),
        payload={},
        metadata={},
    )


def test_worker_service_start_and_stop_skips_legacy_warm_runner_lifecycle(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "runner_lifecycle.db"))
    events: list[str] = []

    service = WorkerService(_build_config(tmp_path, runner_mode="warm_process"))
    service.resource_monitor = SimpleNamespace(
        start=lambda: events.append("resource_start"),
        stop=lambda: events.append("resource_stop"),
    )
    monkeypatch.setattr(service, "_recover_stuck_tasks", lambda: 0)
    monkeypatch.setattr(service, "_restore_retry_schedule", lambda: 0)
    monkeypatch.setattr(service, "_spawn_workers", lambda *_args, **_kwargs: None)

    service.start()
    service.stop()

    assert events == [
        "resource_start",
        "resource_stop",
    ]


def test_run_internal_pipeline_ignores_legacy_warm_runner_and_uses_video_pipeline(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "video_pipeline_direct.db"))
    service = WorkerService(_build_config(tmp_path))

    source = tmp_path / "source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video" * 64)
    expected_output = Path(service.config.output_dir) / "video-task-1" / "final.mp4"
    runner_calls: list[str] = []
    captured: dict[str, object] = {}

    class FakeRunner:
        def execute(self, *, payload, timeout_seconds):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = payload
            _ = timeout_seconds
            runner_calls.append("execute")
            raise AssertionError("legacy warm runner should not be used")

    class FakeVideoPipeline:
        def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = logger
            _ = performance_tracker
            _ = resource_monitor
            captured["output_dir"] = config.output_dir

        def run(self, input_video, task_id, start_from_stage=0, forum_post_info=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            expected_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            expected_output.write_bytes(b"done")
            captured["input_video"] = input_video
            captured["task_id"] = task_id
            captured["start_from_stage"] = start_from_stage
            captured["forum_post_info"] = forum_post_info
            return SimpleNamespace(
                success=True,
                output_file=str(expected_output),
                executed_stages=["stage1_transcode", "stage9_organize"],
                performance_summary="video pipeline ok",
                current_stage=11,
                last_stage="stage9_organize",
                failed_stage=None,
                performance_report=None,
            )

    service.internal_pipeline_runner = FakeRunner()
    monkeypatch.setattr(worker_service_module, "VideoPipeline", FakeVideoPipeline)
    monkeypatch.setattr(
        worker_service_module.subprocess,
        "run",
        lambda *args, **kwargs: (_ for _ in ()).throw(AssertionError("subprocess should not run")),
    )

    result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(_build_task(source), str(source))

    assert runner_calls == []
    assert captured["output_dir"] == str(service.config.output_dir)
    assert captured["input_video"] == str(source)
    assert captured["task_id"] == "video-task-1"
    assert captured["start_from_stage"] == 0
    assert result["output_path"] == str(expected_output)
    assert result["executed_mode"] == "video_pipeline"


def test_run_internal_pipeline_raises_when_video_pipeline_fails(
    monkeypatch,
    tmp_path,
) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "video_pipeline_error.db"))
    service = WorkerService(_build_config(tmp_path))

    source = tmp_path / "source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video" * 64)

    class FailingRunner:
        def execute(self, *, payload, timeout_seconds):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = payload
            _ = timeout_seconds
            raise AssertionError("legacy warm runner should not be used")

    class FailingVideoPipeline:
        def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = config
            _ = logger
            _ = performance_tracker
            _ = resource_monitor

        def run(self, input_video, task_id, start_from_stage=0, forum_post_info=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = input_video
            _ = task_id
            _ = start_from_stage
            _ = forum_post_info
            return SimpleNamespace(
                success=False,
                output_file="",
                error_message="stage6 failed",
                executed_stages=["stage1_transcode"],
                performance_summary="failed",
                current_stage=6,
                last_stage="",
                failed_stage="stage6_clip",
                performance_report=None,
            )

    service.internal_pipeline_runner = FailingRunner()
    monkeypatch.setattr(worker_service_module, "VideoPipeline", FailingVideoPipeline)
    monkeypatch.setattr(
        worker_service_module.subprocess,
        "run",
        lambda *args, **kwargs: (_ for _ in ()).throw(AssertionError("subprocess fallback should not run")),
    )

    try:
        service._run_internal_video_pipeline(_build_task(source), str(source))
    except RuntimeError as exc:
        assert "stage6 failed" in str(exc)
    else:
        raise AssertionError("expected video pipeline failure")

    state_payload = (Path(service.config.output_dir) / "video-task-1" / "state.json").read_text(
        encoding="utf-8"
    )
    assert '"last_completed_step": 5' in state_payload
    assert '"last_completed_step_name": "stage5_ai_text"' in state_payload

from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import hashlib
import importlib.util
import json
from pathlib import Path
import sys
from types import SimpleNamespace
import time

import pytest

from apps.worker.service import NonRetryableUploadError, WorkerService
from domain.task.models import TaskStatus, TaskType, UnifiedTask


@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
def _set_fast_pipeline_env(monkeypatch) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    # Keep stage execution deterministic in CI/local without heavyweight ASR inference.
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_ASR_BACKEND", "sidecar")
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE2_MODE", "copy")
    original_find_spec = importlib.util.find_spec

    def fake_find_spec(name, package=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        if name == "funasr":
            return None
        return original_find_spec(name, package)

    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.worker.service.importlib.util.find_spec", fake_find_spec)


def _build_config(tmp_path) -> SimpleNamespace:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    ns_hash = hashlib.md5(str(tmp_path).encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
    namespace = f"clonecut_worker_unit_{ns_hash}:"
    return SimpleNamespace(
        redis_host="127.0.0.1",
        redis_port=6379,
        redis_db=0,
        redis_password="",
        redis_namespace=namespace,

token_count #1079 07:46:52
total_tokens=20330924
total 20330924in 20543860out 143602reason 31721
Tool Result #1080 apply_patch call_D4OIPhi4TNo03MKcpCD6zU8s 07:46:52
apply_patch output=apply_patch verification failed: Failed to find expected lines in C:\Users\ai\.config\superpowers\worktrees\clonecut\codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328\apps\worker\service.py...
Show output payload 
apply_patch verification failed: Failed to find expected lines in C:\Users\ai\.config\superpowers\worktrees\clonecut\codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328\apps\worker\service.py:
        else:
            clip_text_file = self._pick_first_text(
                payload.get("clip_text_file"),
                metadata.get("clip_text_file"),
            )
            if clip_text_file and Path(clip_text_file).exists():
                options["clip_text_file"] = clip_text_file

        return options

    def _normalize_internal_pipeline_model_name(self, model_name: str) -> Tuple[str, Optional[str]]:
        raw_model = str(model_name or "").strip()
        if not raw_model:
            return "", None

        normalized = raw_model.lower()
        supported = {"openai", "qwen", "g4f", "deepseek", "kimi"}
        if normalized in supported:
            return normalized, None

        # Old stage5 only accepts provider ids. Route custom backend model ids
        # through the OpenAI-compatible adapter and pass the real backend via env.
        return "openai", raw_model

    def _collect_internal_pipeline_tool_dirs(self) -> List[str]:
        tool_dirs: List[str] = []

        explicit_dir = str(
            os.getenv("CLONECUT_FFMPEG_BIN_DIR", "") or os.getenv("FFMPEG_BIN_DIR", "")
        ).strip()
        if explicit_dir:
            candidate = Path(explicit_dir).expanduser().resolve()
            if candidate.exists():
                tool_dirs.append(str(candidate))

        base_prefix = str(getattr(sys, "base_prefix", "") or "").strip()
        if base_prefix:
            prefix_path = Path(base_prefix).resolve()
            sibling_ffmpeg_dir = prefix_path.parent / "ffmpeg" / "bin"
            if sibling_ffmpeg_dir.exists():
                tool_dirs.append(str(sibling_ffmpeg_dir))

        deduped: List[str] = []
        seen: set[str] = set()
        for item in tool_dirs:
            normalized = str(item).strip()
            if normalized and normalized not in seen:
                seen.add(normalized)
                deduped.append(normalized)
        return deduped

    def _append_internal_pipeline_args(self, cmd: List[str], pipeline_inputs: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        model_name = str(pipeline_inputs.get("model") or "").strip()
        if model_name:
            cmd.extend(["--model", model_name])

        file_encoding = str(pipeline_inputs.get("file_encoding") or "").strip()
        if file_encoding:
            cmd.extend(["--file-encoding", file_encoding])

        if "stage5_use_preprocessor" in pipeline_inputs:
            if bool(pipeline_inputs["stage5_use_preprocessor"]):
                cmd.append("--enable-preprocess")
            else:
                cmd.append("--disable-preprocess")

        clip_text_file = str(pipeline_inputs.get("clip_text_file") or "").strip()
        if clip_text_file:
            cmd.extend(["--clip-text-file", clip_text_file])

        forum_post_info_json = str(pipeline_inputs.get("forum_post_info_json") or "").strip()
        if forum_post_info_json:
            cmd.extend(["--forum-post-info-json", forum_post_info_json])

        # Keep root artifacts for worker resolution instead of letting stage9 delete them.
        cmd.extend(["--organize-delete-original", "false"])

    def _build_internal_pipeline_env(self, pipeline_inputs: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> Dict[str, str]:
        env = dict(os.environ)
        path_entries: List[str] = []

        python_scripts_dir = Path(sys.executable).resolve().parent
        if python_scripts_dir.exists():
            path_entries.append(str(python_scripts_dir))

        path_entries.extend(self._collect_internal_pipeline_tool_dirs())

        current_path = str(env.get("PATH", "") or "")
        if current_path:
            path_entries.append(current_path)
        env["PATH"] = os.pathsep.join(path_entries)

        # Keep legacy pipeline subprocess I/O stable on Windows even when old
        # Rich logs emit emoji or non-ASCII text.
        env["PYTHONIOENCODING"] = "utf-8"
        env["PYTHONUTF8"] = "1"

        backend_model = ""
        if isinstance(pipeline_inputs, dict):
            backend_model = str(pipeline_inputs.get("openai_backend_model") or "").strip()
        if backend_model:
            env["OPENAI_BACKEND_MODEL"] = backend_model
        return env

    def _resolve_internal_pipeline_output_path(self, task_dir: Path, source_path: Path) -> Path:
        state_file = task_dir / "state.json"
        if not state_file.exists():
            raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline state missing: {state_file}")
        try:
            payload = json.loads(state_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        except Exception as exc:
            raise RuntimeError(f"parse internal pipeline state failed: {state_file}: {exc}") from exc

        last_completed_step = int(payload.get("last_completed_step", -1))
        if last_completed_step < 9:
            raise RuntimeError(
                f"internal pipeline incomplete: last_completed_step={last_completed_step} state_file={state_file}"
            )
        output_file = str(payload.get("output_file") or "").strip()
        if output_file:
            candidate = Path(output_file)
            if candidate.exists():
                return candidate

        patterns = [
            f"{source_path.stem}*_鏅鸿兘鍓緫甯﹀瓧骞曠増*.mp4",
            "*_鏅鸿兘鍓緫甯﹀瓧骞曠増*.mp4",
            "*.mp4",
        ]
        for pattern in patterns:
            candidates = [
                p for p in task_dir.rglob(pattern)
                if p.is_file() and "_stages" not in p.parts and "debug" not in p.parts
            ]
            if candidates:
                candidates.sort(key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
                return candidates[0]

        raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline produced no video output under: {task_dir}")

    def _normalize_internal_pipeline_model_name(self, model_name: str) -> Tuple[str, Optional[str]]:
        raw_model = str(model_name or "").strip()
        if not raw_model:
            return "", None

        normalized = raw_model.lower()
        supported = {"openai", "qwen", "g4f", "deepseek", "kimi"}
        if normalized in supported:
            return normalized, None

        # Old stage5 only accepts provider ids. Route custom backend model ids
        # through the OpenAI-compatible adapter and pass the real backend via env.
        return "openai", raw_model

    def _collect_internal_pipeline_tool_dirs(self) -> List[str]:
        tool_dirs: List[str] = []

        explicit_dir = str(
            os.getenv("CLONECUT_FFMPEG_BIN_DIR", "") or os.getenv("FFMPEG_BIN_DIR", "")
        ).strip()
        if explicit_dir:
            candidate = Path(explicit_dir).expanduser().resolve()
            if candidate.exists():
                tool_dirs.append(str(candidate))

        base_prefix = str(getattr(sys, "base_prefix", "") or "").strip()
        if base_prefix:
            prefix_path = Path(base_prefix).resolve()
            sibling_ffmpeg_dir = prefix_path.parent / "ffmpeg" / "bin"
            if sibling_ffmpeg_dir.exists():
                tool_dirs.append(str(sibling_ffmpeg_dir))

        deduped: List[str] = []
        seen: set[str] = set()
        for item in tool_dirs:
            normalized = str(item).strip()
            if normalized and normalized not in seen:
                seen.add(normalized)
                deduped.append(normalized)
        return deduped

    def _append_internal_pipeline_args(self, cmd: List[str], pipeline_inputs: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        model_name = str(pipeline_inputs.get("model") or "").strip()
        if model_name:
            cmd.extend(["--model", model_name])

        file_encoding = str(pipeline_inputs.get("file_encoding") or "").strip()
        if file_encoding:
            cmd.extend(["--file-encoding", file_encoding])

        if "stage5_use_preprocessor" in pipeline_inputs:
            if bool(pipeline_inputs["stage5_use_preprocessor"]):
                cmd.append("--enable-preprocess")
            else:
                cmd.append("--disable-preprocess")

        clip_text_file = str(pipeline_inputs.get("clip_text_file") or "").strip()
        if clip_text_file:
            cmd.extend(["--clip-text-file", clip_text_file])

        forum_post_info_json = str(pipeline_inputs.get("forum_post_info_json") or "").strip()
        if forum_post_info_json:
            cmd.extend(["--forum-post-info-json", forum_post_info_json])

        # Keep root artifacts for worker resolution instead of letting stage9 delete them.
        cmd.extend(["--organize-delete-original", "false"])

    def _build_internal_pipeline_env(self, pipeline_inputs: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> Dict[str, str]:
        env = dict(os.environ)
        path_entries: List[str] = []

        python_scripts_dir = Path(sys.executable).resolve().parent
        if python_scripts_dir.exists():
            path_entries.append(str(python_scripts_dir))

        path_entries.extend(self._collect_internal_pipeline_tool_dirs())

        current_path = str(env.get("PATH", "") or "")
        if current_path:
            path_entries.append(current_path)
        env["PATH"] = os.pathsep.join(path_entries)

        # Keep legacy pipeline subprocess I/O stable on Windows even when old
        # Rich logs emit emoji or non-ASCII text.
        env["PYTHONIOENCODING"] = "utf-8"
        env["PYTHONUTF8"] = "1"

        backend_model = ""
        if isinstance(pipeline_inputs, dict):
            backend_model = str(pipeline_inputs.get("openai_backend_model") or "").strip()
        if backend_model:
            env["OPENAI_BACKEND_MODEL"] = backend_model
        return env

    def _resolve_internal_pipeline_output_path(self, task_dir: Path, source_path: Path) -> Path:
        state_file = task_dir / "state.json"
        if not state_file.exists():
            raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline state missing: {state_file}")
        try:
            payload = json.loads(state_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        except Exception as exc:
            raise RuntimeError(f"parse internal pipeline state failed: {state_file}: {exc}") from exc

        last_completed_step = int(payload.get("last_completed_step", -1))
        if last_completed_step < 9:
            raise RuntimeError(
                f"internal pipeline incomplete: last_completed_step={last_completed_step} state_file={state_file}"
            )
        output_file = str(payload.get("output_file") or "").strip()
        if output_file:
            candidate = Path(output_file)
            if candidate.exists():
                return candidate

        patterns = [
            f"{source_path.stem}*_鏅鸿兘鍓緫甯﹀瓧骞曠増*.mp4",
            "*_鏅鸿兘鍓緫甯﹀瓧骞曠増*.mp4",
            "*.mp4",
        ]
        for pattern in patterns:
            candidates = [
                p for p in task_dir.rglob(pattern)
                if p.is_file() and "_stages" not in p.parts and "debug" not in p.parts
            ]
            if candidates:
                candidates.sort(key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
                return candidates[0]

        raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline produced no video output under: {task_dir}")

    def _run_internal_video_pipeline_fallback_copy(
        self,
        task: UnifiedTask,
        source: Path,
        task_dir: Path,
        stage_names: List[str],
        start_from_stage: int,
        reason: str,
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        stage_dir = task_dir / "_stages"
        stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        output_path = task_dir / f"{task.task_id}{source.suffix or '.mp4'}"
        shutil.copy2(source, output_path)

        asr_srt = stage_dir / f"{task.task_id}_stage4_asr_subtitles.srt"
        asr_srt.write_text(
            "\n".join(
                [
                    "1",
                    "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000",
                    "internal pipeline fallback subtitle",
                    "",

apply_patch output=apply_patch verification failed: Failed to find expected lines in C:\Users\ai\.config\superpowers\worktrees\clonecut\codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328\apps\worker\service.py...
Show output payload 
apply_patch verification failed: Failed to find expected lines in C:\Users\ai\.config\superpowers\worktrees\clonecut\codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328\apps\worker\service.py:
    def _normalize_internal_pipeline_model_name(self, model_name: str) -> Tuple[str, Optional[str]]:
        raw_model = str(model_name or "").strip()
        if not raw_model:
            return "", None

        normalized = raw_model.lower()
        supported = {"openai", "qwen", "g4f", "deepseek", "kimi"}
        if normalized in supported:
            return normalized, None

        # Old stage5 only accepts provider ids. Route custom backend model ids
        # through the OpenAI-compatible adapter and pass the real backend via env.
        return "openai", raw_model

    def _collect_internal_pipeline_tool_dirs(self) -> List[str]:
        tool_dirs: List[str] = []

        explicit_dir = str(
            os.getenv("CLONECUT_FFMPEG_BIN_DIR", "") or os.getenv("FFMPEG_BIN_DIR", "")
        ).strip()
        if explicit_dir:
            candidate = Path(explicit_dir).expanduser().resolve()
            if candidate.exists():
                tool_dirs.append(str(candidate))

        base_prefix = str(getattr(sys, "base_prefix", "") or "").strip()
        if base_prefix:
            prefix_path = Path(base_prefix).resolve()
            sibling_ffmpeg_dir = prefix_path.parent / "ffmpeg" / "bin"
            if sibling_ffmpeg_dir.exists():
                tool_dirs.append(str(sibling_ffmpeg_dir))

        deduped: List[str] = []
        seen: set[str] = set()
        for item in tool_dirs:
            normalized = str(item).strip()
            if normalized and normalized not in seen:
                seen.add(normalized)
                deduped.append(normalized)
        return deduped

    def _append_internal_pipeline_args(self, cmd: List[str], pipeline_inputs: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        model_name = str(pipeline_inputs.get("model") or "").strip()
        if model_name:
            cmd.extend(["--model", model_name])

        file_encoding = str(pipeline_inputs.get("file_encoding") or "").strip()
        if file_encoding:
            cmd.extend(["--file-encoding", file_encoding])

        if "stage5_use_preprocessor" in pipeline_inputs:
            if bool(pipeline_inputs["stage5_use_preprocessor"]):
                cmd.append("--enable-preprocess")
            else:
                cmd.append("--disable-preprocess")

        clip_text_file = str(pipeline_inputs.get("clip_text_file") or "").strip()
        if clip_text_file:
            cmd.extend(["--clip-text-file", clip_text_file])

        forum_post_info_json = str(pipeline_inputs.get("forum_post_info_json") or "").strip()
        if forum_post_info_json:
            cmd.extend(["--forum-post-info-json", forum_post_info_json])

        # Keep root artifacts for worker resolution instead of letting stage9 delete them.
        cmd.extend(["--organize-delete-original", "false"])

    def _build_internal_pipeline_env(self, pipeline_inputs: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> Dict[str, str]:
        env = dict(os.environ)
        path_entries: List[str] = []

        python_scripts_dir = Path(sys.executable).resolve().parent
        if python_scripts_dir.exists():
            path_entries.append(str(python_scripts_dir))

        path_entries.extend(self._collect_internal_pipeline_tool_dirs())

        current_path = str(env.get("PATH", "") or "")
        if current_path:
            path_entries.append(current_path)
        env["PATH"] = os.pathsep.join(path_entries)

        # Keep legacy pipeline subprocess I/O stable on Windows even when old
        # Rich logs emit emoji or non-ASCII text.
        env["PYTHONIOENCODING"] = "utf-8"
        env["PYTHONUTF8"] = "1"

        backend_model = ""
        if isinstance(pipeline_inputs, dict):
            backend_model = str(pipeline_inputs.get("openai_backend_model") or "").strip()
        if backend_model:
            env["OPENAI_BACKEND_MODEL"] = backend_model
        return env

    def _resolve_internal_pipeline_output_path(self, task_dir: Path, source_path: Path) -> Path:
        state_file = task_dir / "state.json"
        if not state_file.exists():
            raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline state missing: {state_file}")
        try:
            payload = json.loads(state_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        except Exception as exc:
            raise RuntimeError(f"parse internal pipeline state failed: {state_file}: {exc}") from exc

        last_completed_step = int(payload.get("last_completed_step", -1))
        if last_completed_step < 9:
            raise RuntimeError(
                f"internal pipeline incomplete: last_completed_step={last_completed_step} state_file={state_file}"
            )
        output_file = str(payload.get("output_file") or "").strip()
        if output_file:
            candidate = Path(output_file)
            if candidate.exists():
                return candidate

        patterns = [
            f"{source_path.stem}*_鏅鸿兘鍓緫甯﹀瓧骞曠増*.mp4",
            "*_鏅鸿兘鍓緫甯﹀瓧骞曠増*.mp4",
            "*.mp4",
        ]
        for pattern in patterns:
            candidates = [
                p for p in task_dir.rglob(pattern)
                if p.is_file() and "_stages" not in p.parts and "debug" not in p.parts
            ]
            if candidates:
                candidates.sort(key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
                return candidates[0]

        raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline produced no video output under: {task_dir}")

    def _run_internal_video_pipeline_fallback_copy(
        self,
        task: UnifiedTask,
        source: Path,

assistant #1121 commentary 07:53:49

当前进度是：主修复已经做完，而且那一轮针对性测试都过了，但我在最后复核时又拎出了两个边角问题，所以还没向你报“彻底收口”。

具体是这两个：
- clip_text_file 这类输入现在还是“解析了，但没有稳定落到 task root”，我想把它补成真正可用的 direct-pipeline 输入。
- state.json 在“第一阶段就失败”的极端情况下，存在把 stage0 误记成已完成的风险，我要把这个语义彻底钉死。

不是卡住了，是我在做最后一轮补丁和 review，避免现在说完成、回头又被打回来。你不用额外做什么，我继续收这个尾。

Show output payload 
apply_patch verification failed: Failed to find expected lines in C:\Users\ai\.config\superpowers\worktrees\clonecut\codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328\apps\worker\service.py:
    def _resolve_internal_pipeline_output_path(self, task_dir: Path, source_path: Path) -> Path:
        state_file = task_dir / "state.json"
        if not state_file.exists():
            raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline state missing: {state_file}")
        try:
            payload = json.loads(state_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        except Exception as exc:
            raise RuntimeError(f"parse internal pipeline state failed: {state_file}: {exc}") from exc

        last_completed_step = int(payload.get("last_completed_step", -1))
        if last_completed_step < 9:
            raise RuntimeError(
                f"internal pipeline incomplete: last_completed_step={last_completed_step} state_file={state_file}"
            )
        output_file = str(payload.get("output_file") or "").strip()
        if output_file:
            candidate = Path(output_file)
            if candidate.exists():
                return candidate

        patterns = [
            f"{source_path.stem}*_鏅鸿兘鍓緫甯﹀瓧骞曠増*.mp4",
            "*_鏅鸿兘鍓緫甯﹀瓧骞曠増*.mp4",
            "*.mp4",
        ]
        for pattern in patterns:
            candidates = [
                p for p in task_dir.rglob(pattern)
                if p.is_file() and "_stages" not in p.parts and "debug" not in p.parts
            ]
            if candidates:
                candidates.sort(key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
                return candidates[0]

        raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline produced no video output under: {task_dir}")

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: def _resolve_internal_pipeline_output_path(self, task_dir: Path, source_path: Path) -> Path: state_file = task_dir / "state.json" if ...

Output:

    def _resolve_internal_pipeline_output_path(self, task_dir: Path, source_path: Path) -> Path:
        state_file = task_dir / "state.json"
        if not state_file.exists():
            raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline state missing: {state_file}")
        try:
            payload = json.loads(state_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        except Exception as exc:
            raise RuntimeError(f"parse internal pipeline state failed: {state_file}: {exc}") from exc

        last_completed_step = int(payload.get("last_completed_step", -1))
        if last_completed_step < 9:
            raise RuntimeError(
                f"internal pipeline incomplete: last_completed_step={last_completed_step} state_file={state_file}"
            )
        output_file = str(payload.get("output_file") or "").strip()
        if output_file:
            candidate = Path(output_file)
            if candidate.exists():
                return candidate

        patterns = [
            f"{source_path.stem}*_鏅鸿兘鍓緫甯﹀瓧骞曠増*.mp4",
            "*_鏅鸿兘鍓緫甯﹀瓧骞曠増*.mp4",
            "*.mp4",
        ]
        for pattern in patterns:
            candidates = [
                p for p in task_dir.rglob(pattern)
                if p.is_file() and "_stages" not in p.parts and "debug" not in p.parts
            ]
            if candidates:
                candidates.sort(key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
                return candidates[0]

        raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline produced no video output under: {task_dir}")

    def _run_internal_video_pipeline_fallback_copy(

    def _resolve_internal_pipeline_output_path(self, task_dir: Path, source_path: Path) -> Path:
        state_file = task_dir / "state.json"
        if not state_file.exists():
            raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline state missing: {state_file}")
        try:
            payload = json.loads(state_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        except Exception as exc:
            raise RuntimeError(f"parse internal pipeline state failed: {state_file}: {exc}") from exc

        last_completed_step = int(payload.get("last_completed_step", -1))
        if last_completed_step < 9:
            raise RuntimeError(
                f"internal pipeline incomplete: last_completed_step={last_completed_step} state_file={state_file}"
            )
        output_file = str(payload.get("output_file") or "").strip()
        if output_file:
            candidate = Path(output_file)
            if candidate.exists():
                return candidate

        patterns = [
            f"{source_path.stem}*_鏅鸿兘鍓緫甯﹀瓧骞曠増*.mp4",
            "*_鏅鸿兘鍓緫甯﹀瓧骞曠増*.mp4",
            "*.mp4",
        ]
        for pattern in patterns:
            candidates = [
                p for p in task_dir.rglob(pattern)
                if p.is_file() and "_stages" not in p.parts and "debug" not in p.parts
            ]
            if candidates:
                candidates.sort(key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
                return candidates[0]

        raise RuntimeError(f"internal pipeline produced no video output under: {task_dir}")

 def test_internal_pipeline_context_keeps_only_forum_snapshot_and_clip_text(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_context.db"))
     cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
     service = WorkerService(cfg)
     task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / "context-task"
     task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
     source = tmp_path / "context-source.mp4"
     source.write_bytes(b"video-content")
+    user_clip_text = tmp_path / "user-clip-text.txt"
+    user_clip_text.write_text("user clip text", encoding="utf-8")
 
     task = UnifiedTask(
         task_id="context-task",
         task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
         source="unit",
         source_path=str(source),
         payload={
-            "clip_text": "user clip text",
+            "clip_text_file": str(user_clip_text),
             "stage5_model_name": "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4",
             "file_encoding": "utf-8",
             "stage5_use_preprocessor": True,
         },
         metadata={
@@
     assert "openai_backend_model" not in options
     assert "file_encoding" not in options
     assert "stage5_use_preprocessor" not in options
+    assert options.get("clip_text_file") == str(task_dir / "clip_text.txt")
     assert (task_dir / "clip_text.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8") == "user clip text"

-

@@
 def test_run_internal_pipeline_raises_when_video_pipeline_fails(
     monkeypatch,
     tmp_path,
 ) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
@@
     state_payload = (Path(service.config.output_dir) / "video-task-1" / "state.json").read_text(
         encoding="utf-8"
     )
     assert '"last_completed_step": 5' in state_payload
     assert '"last_completed_step_name": "stage5_ai_text"' in state_payload
+
+
+def test_run_internal_pipeline_first_stage_failure_keeps_state_incomplete(
+    monkeypatch,
+    tmp_path,
+) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "video_pipeline_stage0_error.db"))
+    service = WorkerService(_build_config(tmp_path))
+
+    source = tmp_path / "source.mp4"
+    source.write_bytes(b"video" * 64)
+
+    class FailingVideoPipeline:
+        def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+            _ = config
+            _ = logger
+            _ = performance_tracker
+            _ = resource_monitor
+
+        def run(self, input_video, task_id, start_from_stage=0, forum_post_info=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+            _ = input_video
+            _ = task_id
+            _ = start_from_stage
+            _ = forum_post_info
+            return SimpleNamespace(
+                success=False,
+                output_file="",
+                error_message="stage0 failed",
+                executed_stages=[],
+                performance_summary="failed",
+                current_stage=0,
+                last_stage="",
+                failed_stage="stage0_clean",
+                performance_report=None,
+            )
+
+    monkeypatch.setattr(worker_service_module, "VideoPipeline", FailingVideoPipeline)
+
+    try:
+        service._run_internal_video_pipeline(_build_task(source), str(source))
+    except RuntimeError as exc:
+        assert "stage0 failed" in str(exc)
+    else:
+        raise AssertionError("expected video pipeline failure")
+
+    state_payload = (Path(service.config.output_dir) / "video-task-1" / "state.json").read_text(
+        encoding="utf-8"
+    )
+    assert '"last_completed_step": -1' in state_payload
+    assert '"last_completed_step_name": ""' in state_payload
*** End Patch

{
  "agent_type": "default",
  "model": "gpt-5.4",
  "reasoning_effort": "high",
  "fork_context": false,
  "message": "You are performing a spec-compliance review of a bounded Task 3 fix-up in the CloneCut worktree.\n\nWorktree root: C:\\Users\\ai\\.config\\superpowers\\worktrees\\clonecut\\codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328\n\nReview only the CURRENT worktree state. Do not trust the implementation report. Read the actual code.\n\n## What Was Requested\nThis is a follow-up fix for Task 3 (worker/API cutover to VideoPipeline). Review only these requirements:\n\n1. Preserve user-provided clip_text across worker cutover.\n- If task-root clip_text.txt already exists, stage5 must not overwrite it.\n- Direct pipeline migration context must materialize clip_text inputs so stage6 can read them from task root.\n- Normal no-user-input behavior should still create clip_text.txt for current contracts.\n\n2. Remove or clearly disable obsolete warm runner lifecycle from WorkerService mainline.\n- Worker mainline should no longer construct/start/stop InternalPipelineWarmRunner for the direct VideoPipeline path.\n- Tiny-input migration fallback must remain intact.\n\n3. Tighten state.json compatibility semantics.\n- state.json must report the last successful legacy step only.\n- A failed stage must not be recorded as completed.\n- last_completed_step must not exceed legacy 0..9 semantics.\n\n4. Reduce dead legacy context shaping.\n- _prepare_internal_pipeline_context should keep only context actually used by the direct pipeline migration path, such as forum snapshotting and clip-text materialization.\n- Legacy model/file_encoding/preprocessor/backend parsing should no longer be part of this path.\n\n## Files to Inspect\n- apps/worker/service.py\n- domain/video/stages/stage5_ai_text.py\n- tests/unit/test_worker_service.py\n- tests/unit/test_worker_internal_pipeline_runner.py\n- tests/unit/test_stage4_stage5.py\n\n## Helpful context\n- Current targeted verification already passed locally:\n  - .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_stage4_stage5.py -q\n  - .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_worker_service.py -k \"internal_pipeline_executes_stage1_to_stage8 or attach_video_render_manifest_collects_primary_subtitle_cover_and_state or fast_fallback_for_tiny_placeholder_video or internal_pipeline_context_keeps_only_forum_snapshot_and_clip_text\" -q\n  - .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_worker_internal_pipeline_runner.py -q\n\n## What Implementer Claimed\n- Stage5 preserves existing task-root clip_text.txt.\n- Worker no longer runs warm runner lifecycle.\n- state.json now tracks last successful legacy step only.\n- _prepare_internal_pipeline_context only retains forum snapshot + clip-text behavior.\n\n## Your Job\nIndependently inspect the code and compare it to the above requirements.\nReport only:\n- ✅ Spec compliant\nor\n- ❌ Issues found: specific missing/extra/wrong items with file:line references.\n\nBe strict. If something only partially satisfies the requirement, call it out."
}

kept only forum snapshot + clip-text materialization behavior used by migration path.\n\nTests run and results:\n- `./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_stage4_stage5.py -q` → `13 passed`\n- `./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_worker_service.py -k \"internal_pipeline_executes_stage1_to_stage8 or attach_video_render_manifest_collects_primary_subtitle_cover_and_state or fast_fallback_for_tiny_placeholder_video\" -q` → `3 passed, 24 deselected`\n- `./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_worker_internal_pipeline_runner.py -q` → `3 passed`\n- Added targeted selector:\n  `./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_worker_service.py -k \"internal_pipeline_context_keeps_only_forum_snapshot_and_clip_text\" -q` → `1 passed, 26 deselected`\n\nFiles changed:\n- [apps/worker/service.py](C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/apps/worker/service.py)\n- [domain/video/stages/stage5_ai_text.py](C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/domain/video/stages/stage5_ai_text.py)\n- [tests/unit/test_worker_service.py](C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py)\n- [tests/unit/test_worker_internal_pipeline_runner.py](C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/tests/unit/test_worker_internal_pipeline_runner.py)\n- [tests/unit/test_stage4_stage5.py](C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/tests/unit/test_stage4_stage5.py)\n\nSelf-review / remaining concerns:\n- No functional blockers remain for the requested Task 3 fix-up scope.\n- Test runs show an existing `RequestsDependencyWarning` (unrelated to this change)."

If task-root clip_text.txt already exists, stage5 must not overwrite it.\n2. Direct pipeline migration context must materialize clip_text inputs so stage6 reads task-root clip_text.txt.\n3. Worker mainline should no longer construct/start/stop InternalPipelineWarmRunner for the direct VideoPipeline path.\n4. Tiny-input migration fallback must remain intact.\n5. state.json must report the last successful legacy step only, never the failed stage as completed, and never exceed legacy 0..9 semantics.\n6. _prepare_internal_pipeline_context should retain only actually used direct-path context behavior (forum snapshot + clip-text materialization), not legacy model/encoding/preprocessor/backend parsing.\n\n## Verification Already Run\n- .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_stage4_stage5.py -q\n- .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_worker_service.py -k \"internal_pipeline_executes_stage1_to_stage8 or attach_video_render_manifest_collects_primary_subtitle_cover_and_state or fast_fallback_for_tiny_placeholder_video or internal_pipeline_context_keeps_only_forum_snapshot_and_clip_text\" -q\n- .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_worker_internal_pipeline_runner.py -q\n\n## Review focus\nIn addition to general code quality, please check:\n- Is the state.json failure logic robust at boundaries?\n- Did the worker truly stop depending on the warm runner path, or is misleading dead code still present?\n- Are the tests actually covering the important contract risks rather than only mocked happy paths?\n- Did the change introduce any maintainability or clarity regressions?\n\n## Output format\n### Strengths\n### Issues\n#### Critical (Must Fix)\n#### Important (Should Fix)\n#### Minor (Nice to Have)\nFor each issue include file:line, what is wrong, why it matters, and how to fix if not obvious.\n### Recommendations\n### Assessment\nReady to merge? Yes/No/With fixes\nReasoning: 1-2 sentences\n\nBe specific and honest. If there are no issues, say so explicitly."
}

Tool Result #1249 wait_agent call_WGFOHu6HRAHzKLXLwbGYCGn4 08:11:06
wait_agent output={"status":{"019d3378-56bc-75e0-a47e-79ef5d8a44bc":{"completed":"### Strengths\n- [domain/video/stages/stage5_ai_text.py#L29](/C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/...
Show output payload 
{
  "status": {
    "019d3378-56bc-75e0-a47e-79ef5d8a44bc": {
      "completed": "### Strengths\n- [domain/video/stages/stage5_ai_text.py#L29](/C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/domain/video/stages/stage5_ai_text.py#L29) now preserves an existing task-root `clip_text.txt`, and [apps/worker/service.py#L1518](/C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/apps/worker/service.py#L1518) materializes direct-path `clip_text` / `clip_text_file` into that same task-root location, which lines up with stage6’s lookup behavior.\n- [apps/worker/service.py#L221](/C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/apps/worker/service.py#L221), [apps/worker/service.py#L239](/C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/apps/worker/service.py#L239), and [apps/worker/service.py#L278](/C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/apps/worker/service.py#L278) no longer construct/start/stop `InternalPipelineWarmRunner`; the worker mainline is genuinely on the direct `VideoPipeline` path now.\n- Tiny-input migration fallback is still present at [apps/worker/service.py#L1323](/C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/apps/worker/service.py#L1323), and the targeted tests do check both fallback and direct-path behavior.\n\n### Issues\n#### Critical (Must Fix)\n- [apps/worker/service.py#L1437](/C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/apps/worker/service.py#L1437) computes `last_completed_step_name` by moving to the previous internal stage, not the previous completed legacy step. That breaks requirement 5 at collapsed-stage boundaries: if `stage7_subtitle` fails, the code currently writes `last_completed_step: 7` and `last_completed_step_name: \"stage7_correct\"`, which overstates progress for legacy step 7. This matters because `state.json` is now the compatibility contract for downstream reporting/resume logic. Fix by deriving completion from a single `stage -> legacy_step` mapping and, on failure, emitting the greatest fully completed legacy step, not merely the previous internal stage.\n\n#### Important (Should Fix)\n- [tests/unit/test_worker_internal_pipeline_runner.py#L134](/C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/tests/unit/test_worker_internal_pipeline_runner.py#L134) and [tests/unit/test_worker_service.py#L265](/C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py#L265) miss the exact contract boundary that just regressed. The new tests cover stage0 and stage6 failure shapes plus mocked success, but not failures at `stage6_5_resub`, `stage7_correct`, or `stage7_subtitle`, and they do not exercise a real worker -> `VideoPipeline` -> stage6 clip-text flow. That matters because the current suite passes while requirement 5 can still fail in production. Fix by adding parametrized state tests for all shared-legacy-step failures and one non-mocked direct-path clip-text propagation test.\n\n#### Minor (Nice to Have)\n- [apps/worker/service.py#L267](/C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/apps/worker/service.py#L267) still logs `internal_runner` and `warm_pool` even though the runner is hard-disabled at [apps/worker/service.py#L225](/C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/apps/worker/service.py#L225), and [tests/unit/test_worker_internal_pipeline_runner.py#L11](/C:/Users/ai/.config/superpowers/worktrees/clonecut/codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328/tests/unit/test_worker_internal_pipeline_runner.py#L11) still centers helper setup around `runner_mode`. It does not break runtime, but it leaves misleading dead-path terminology in place. Fix by renaming/removing the stale logging and simplifying the test helper/file naming around the direct `VideoPipeline` path.\n\n### Recommendations\n- Fix the `state.json` writer first, then add boundary tests for `stage6_5_resub`, `stage7_correct`, and `stage7_subtitle`.\n- Centralize stage metadata instead of duplicating stage order and legacy-step mapping inside `WorkerService`; that will make the compatibility layer much harder to drift.\n- After that, trim the remaining warm-runner terminology so logs and tests reflect the actual runtime architecture.\n\n### Assessment\nReady to merge? No\n\nReasoning: the direct `VideoPipeline` cutover itself looks mostly aligned with scope, but `state.json` still misreports completion for at least one real failure boundary, which violates an explicit compatibility requirement. Once that is fixed and covered by tests, this should be in much better shape."
    }
  },
  "timed_out": false
}

send_input input={"message":"Follow-up fix required from code-quality review. Please update your previous Task 3 fix-up in the same worktree.\n\nWorktree root: C:\\Users\\ai\\.config\\superpower...
Show input payload 
{
  "target": "019d3361-add9-7391-a7c8-f0d3ca22b400",
  "message": "Follow-up fix required from code-quality review. Please update your previous Task 3 fix-up in the same worktree.\n\nWorktree root: C:\\Users\\ai\\.config\\superpowers\\worktrees\\clonecut\\codex-video-pipeline-startup-20260328\n\nYou are not alone in the codebase. Do not revert others' edits. Do not commit.\n\n## Must-fix review issue\nThe current state.json writer still misreports completion at collapsed legacy-step boundaries.\nExample: if stage7_subtitle fails, current code can emit last_completed_step=7 and last_completed_step_name=\"stage7_correct\", which overstates progress for legacy step 7. Requirement is: state.json must report the greatest fully completed LEGACY step only.\n\n## Required changes\n1. Fix apps/worker/service.py so state.json completion is derived from a single stage -> legacy_step mapping and failure uses the previous COMPLETED LEGACY step, not merely the previous internal stage.\n- Shared-step boundaries to handle correctly:\n  - stage6_5_resub failure => last_completed_step 6 and last_completed_step_name should reflect the completed stage for legacy step 6 (stage6_clip is acceptable)\n  - stage7_correct failure => last_completed_step 6, not 7\n  - stage7_subtitle failure => last_completed_step 6, not 7\n  - stage8_cover failure => last_completed_step 7\n  - stage0_clean failure => last_completed_step -1 and empty name\n\n2. Add/adjust tests to cover those boundaries.\n- Add parametrized failure-state tests for at least: stage6_5_resub, stage7_correct, stage7_subtitle, stage8_cover, stage0_clean.\n- Keep the existing stage6 failure case or fold it into the parametrized test.\n\n3. If easy, clean the misleading stale log/test naming around internal_runner/warm_pool so the direct VideoPipeline path is reflected more clearly. Treat this as nice-to-have after the correctness fix.\n\n4. If practical without blowing up scope, add one stronger test around direct-path clip_text propagation (not just helper output) so we cover the real contract a bit better.\n\n## Files you may modify\n- apps/worker/service.py\n- tests/unit/test_worker_internal_pipeline_runner.py\n- tests/unit/test_worker_service.py\n\n## Verification to run\nAt minimum:\n- .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_worker_internal_pipeline_runner.py -q\n- .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_worker_service.py -k \"internal_pipeline_executes_stage1_to_stage8 or internal_pipeline_context_keeps_only_forum_snapshot_and_clip_text or fast_fallback_for_tiny_placeholder_video\" -q\n\nReport back with status, files changed, exact tests run/results, and any remaining concerns."
}

     def _write_internal_pipeline_state(
         self,
         *,
         task_dir: Path,
         output_path: str,
@@
         current_stage: int,
         failed_stage: str = "",
         succeeded: bool = True,
     ) -> None:

-            "stage3_repair": 3,

-            "stage5_ai_text": 5,
-            "stage6_clip": 6,
-            "stage6_5_resub": 6,
-            "stage7_correct": 7,
-            "stage7_subtitle": 7,
-            "stage8_cover": 8,
-            "stage9_organize": 9,
-        }
-        completed_stage_name = self._resolve_internal_pipeline_last_completed_stage_name(
+        last_successful_stage = self._resolve_internal_pipeline_last_successful_stage_name(
             stage_name=stage_name,
             failed_stage=failed_stage if not succeeded else "",
             current_stage=current_stage,
         )
+        completed_step, completed_stage_name = INTERNAL_PIPELINE_COMPLETION_BY_STAGE.get(
+            last_successful_stage,
+            (-1, ""),
+        )
         payload = {
-            "last_completed_step": int(step_mapping.get(completed_stage_name, -1)),
+            "last_completed_step": int(completed_step),
             "last_completed_step_name": completed_stage_name,
             "output_file": output_path,
         }
         state_path = task_dir / "state.json"
         state_path.write_text(
             json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
             encoding="utf-8",
         )
 
-    def _resolve_internal_pipeline_last_completed_stage_name(
+    def _resolve_internal_pipeline_last_successful_stage_name(
         self,
         *,
         stage_name: str,
         failed_stage: str,
         current_stage: int,
     ) -> str:
-        stage_order = [
-            "stage0_clean",
-            "stage1_transcode",
-            "stage2_silence",
-            "stage3_repair",
-            "stage4_asr",
-            "stage5_ai_text",
-            "stage6_clip",
-            "stage6_5_resub",
-            "stage7_correct",
-            "stage7_subtitle",
-            "stage8_cover",
-            "stage9_organize",
-        ]
-        stage_index = {name: idx for idx, name in enumerate(stage_order)}
+        stage_index = {name: idx for idx, name in enumerate(INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER)}
         current_name = str(stage_name or "").strip()
         failed_name = str(failed_stage or "").strip()
 
         if failed_name:
             if current_name and current_name != failed_name:
                 return current_name
             failed_idx = stage_index.get(failed_name)
             if failed_idx is not None:
                 if failed_idx == 0:
                     return ""
-                return stage_order[failed_idx - 1]
+                return INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER[failed_idx - 1]
             if int(current_stage) <= 0:
                 return ""
-            fallback_idx = min(len(stage_order) - 1, int(current_stage) - 1)
-            return stage_order[fallback_idx]
+            fallback_idx = min(len(INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER) - 1, int(current_stage) - 1)
+            return INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER[fallback_idx]
 
         if current_name:
             return current_name
-        fallback_idx = max(0, min(len(stage_order) - 1, int(current_stage)))
-        return stage_order[fallback_idx]
+        fallback_idx = max(0, min(len(INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER) - 1, int(current_stage)))
+        return INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER[fallback_idx]
*** End Patch

Output:

import json
from pathlib import Path
from types import SimpleNamespace

import apps.worker.service as worker_service_module
import pytest
from apps.worker.service import WorkerService
from domain.task.models import TaskType, UnifiedTask


def _build_config(tmp_path, *, runner_mode: str = "subprocess") -> SimpleNamespace:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    return SimpleNamespace(
        redis_host="127.0.0.1",
        redis_port=6379,
        redis_db=0,
        redis_password="",
        redis_namespace="clonecut_worker_test:",
        input_dir=str(tmp_path / "input"),
        output_dir=str(tmp_path / "output"),
        log_dir=str(tmp_path / "logs"),
        raw={
            "queue": {
                "max_retries": 1,
                "retry_backoff_seconds": [1],
            },
            "worker": {
                "max_download_workers": 1,
                "max_process_workers": 1,
                "max_upload_workers": 1,
                "use_internal_pipeline": True,
                "internal_pipeline_runner": runner_mode,
                "internal_pipeline_pool_size": 1,
                "internal_pipeline_warmup_on_start": False,
                "video_command_template": "",
            },
        },
    )


def _build_task(source: Path) -> UnifiedTask:
    return UnifiedTask(
        task_id="video-task-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit-test",
        source_path=str(source),
        payload={},
        metadata={},
    )


def test_worker_service_start_and_stop_skips_legacy_warm_runner_lifecycle(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "runner_lifecycle.db"))
    events: list[str] = []

    service = WorkerService(_build_config(tmp_path, runner_mode="warm_process"))
    service.resource_monitor = SimpleNamespace(
        start=lambda: events.append("resource_start"),
        stop=lambda: events.append("resource_stop"),
    )
    monkeypatch.setattr(service, "_recover_stuck_tasks", lambda: 0)
    monkeypatch.setattr(service, "_restore_retry_schedule", lambda: 0)
    monkeypatch.setattr(service, "_spawn_workers", lambda *_args, **_kwargs: None)

    service.start()
    service.stop()

    assert events == [
        "resource_start",
        "resource_stop",
    ]


def test_run_internal_pipeline_ignores_legacy_warm_runner_and_uses_video_pipeline(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "video_pipeline_direct.db"))
    service = WorkerService(_build_config(tmp_path))

    source = tmp_path / "source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video" * 64)
    expected_output = Path(service.config.output_dir) / "video-task-1" / "final.mp4"
    runner_calls: list[str] = []
    captured: dict[str, object] = {}

    class FakeRunner:
        def execute(self, *, payload, timeout_seconds):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = payload
            _ = timeout_seconds
            runner_calls.append("execute")
            raise AssertionError("legacy warm runner should not be used")

    class FakeVideoPipeline:
        def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = logger
            _ = performance_tracker
            _ = resource_monitor
            captured["output_dir"] = config.output_dir

        def run(self, input_video, task_id, start_from_stage=0, forum_post_info=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            expected_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            expected_output.write_bytes(b"done")
            captured["input_video"] = input_video
            captured["task_id"] = task_id
            captured["start_from_stage"] = start_from_stage
            captured["forum_post_info"] = forum_post_info
            return SimpleNamespace(
                success=True,
                output_file=str(expected_output),
                executed_stages=["stage1_transcode", "stage9_organize"],
                performance_summary="video pipeline ok",
                current_stage=11,
                last_stage="stage9_organize",
                failed_stage=None,
                performance_report=None,
            )

    service.internal_pipeline_runner = FakeRunner()
    monkeypatch.setattr(worker_service_module, "VideoPipeline", FakeVideoPipeline)
    monkeypatch.setattr(
        worker_service_module.subprocess,
        "run",
        lambda *args, **kwargs: (_ for _ in ()).throw(AssertionError("subprocess should not run")),
    )

    result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(_build_task(source), str(source))

    assert runner_calls == []
    assert captured["output_dir"] == str(service.config.output_dir)
    assert captured["input_video"] == str(source)
    assert captured["task_id"] == "video-task-1"
    assert captured["start_from_stage"] == 0
    assert result["output_path"] == str(expected_output)
    assert result["executed_mode"] == "video_pipeline"


@pytest.mark.parametrize(
    ("failed_stage", "current_stage", "expected_step", "expected_name"),
    [
        ("stage6_clip", 6, 5, "stage5_ai_text"),
        ("stage6_5_resub", 7, 6, "stage6_clip"),
        ("stage7_correct", 8, 6, "stage6_clip"),
        ("stage7_subtitle", 9, 6, "stage6_clip"),
        ("stage8_cover", 10, 7, "stage7_subtitle"),
        ("stage0_clean", 0, -1, ""),
    ],
)
def test_run_internal_pipeline_failure_reports_last_completed_legacy_step(
    monkeypatch,
    tmp_path,
    failed_stage: str,
    current_stage: int,
    expected_step: int,
    expected_name: str,
) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    db_name = failed_stage.replace(".", "_")
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / f"{db_name}.db"))
    service = WorkerService(_build_config(tmp_path))

    source = tmp_path / "source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video" * 64)

    class FailingVideoPipeline:
        def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = config
            _ = logger
            _ = performance_tracker
            _ = resource_monitor

        def run(self, input_video, task_id, start_from_stage=0, forum_post_info=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = input_video
            _ = task_id
            _ = start_from_stage
            _ = forum_post_info
            return SimpleNamespace(
                success=False,
                output_file="",
                error_message=f"{failed_stage} failed",
                executed_stages=["stage1_transcode"],
                performance_summary="failed",
                current_stage=current_stage,
                last_stage="",
                failed_stage=failed_stage,
                performance_report=None,
            )

    monkeypatch.setattr(worker_service_module, "VideoPipeline", FailingVideoPipeline)
    monkeypatch.setattr(
        worker_service_module.subprocess,
        "run",
        lambda *args, **kwargs: (_ for _ in ()).throw(AssertionError("subprocess fallback should not run")),
    )

    try:
        service._run_internal_video_pipeline(_build_task(source), str(source))
    except RuntimeError as exc:
        assert f"{failed_stage} failed" in str(exc)
    else:
        raise AssertionError("expected video pipeline failure")

    state_payload = json.loads(
        (Path(service.config.output_dir) / "video-task-1" / "state.json").read_text(
            encoding="utf-8"
        )
    )
    assert state_payload["last_completed_step"] == expected_step
    assert state_payload["last_completed_step_name"] == expected_name

from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import hashlib
import json
from pathlib import Path
from types import SimpleNamespace
import time

import pytest

from apps.worker.service import NonRetryableUploadError, WorkerService
from domain.task.models import TaskStatus, TaskType, UnifiedTask


@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
def _set_fast_pipeline_env(monkeypatch) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    # Keep stage execution deterministic in CI/local without heavyweight ASR inference.
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_ASR_BACKEND", "sidecar")
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE2_MODE", "copy")


def _build_config(tmp_path) -> SimpleNamespace:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    ns_hash = hashlib.md5(str(tmp_path).encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
    namespace = f"clonecut_worker_unit_{ns_hash}:"
    return SimpleNamespace(

        status=TaskStatus.PROCESSING,
    )
    processing_task.started_at = datetime.now() - timedelta(seconds=10)
    service._persist_task(processing_task)

    reclaimed = service._reclaim_zombies_once()
    assert reclaimed == 1

    pending_loaded = service.get_task("pending-zombie-1")
    processing_loaded = service.get_task("processing-fresh-1")
    assert isinstance(pending_loaded, dict)
    assert isinstance(processing_loaded, dict)
    assert pending_loaded.get("status") == TaskStatus.FAILED.value
    assert processing_loaded.get("status") == TaskStatus.PROCESSING.value


def test_internal_pipeline_executes_stage1_to_stage8(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source = tmp_path / "internal-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content" * 128)
    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="internal-pipeline-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_path=str(source),
        payload={"clip_text": "user supplied clip text"},
        metadata={
            "source": "unit",
            "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123", "title": "topic"},
        },
    )

    captured: dict[str, object] = {}
    expected_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "final.mp4"

    class FakeVideoPipeline:
        def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            captured["config_output_dir"] = config.output_dir
            captured["logger"] = logger
            captured["performance_tracker"] = performance_tracker
            captured["resource_monitor"] = resource_monitor

        def run(self, input_video, task_id, start_from_stage=0, forum_post_info=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            expected_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            expected_output.write_bytes(b"final-video")
            clip_text_path = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task_id / "clip_text.txt"
            captured["input_video"] = input_video
            captured["task_id"] = task_id
            captured["start_from_stage"] = start_from_stage
            captured["forum_post_info"] = forum_post_info
            captured["clip_text"] = clip_text_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
            return SimpleNamespace(
                success=True,
                output_file=str(expected_output),
                executed_stages=["stage1_transcode", "stage8_cover", "stage9_organize"],
                performance_summary="video pipeline ok",
                current_stage=11,
                last_stage="stage9_organize",
                failed_stage=None,
                performance_report=None,
            )

    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.worker.service.VideoPipeline", FakeVideoPipeline, raising=False)
    monkeypatch.setattr(
        "apps.worker.service.subprocess.run",
        lambda *args, **kwargs: (_ for _ in ()).throw(AssertionError("legacy subprocess path should not run")),
    )
    monkeypatch.setattr(
        service,
        "_run_internal_video_pipeline_fallback_copy",
        lambda *args, **kwargs: (_ for _ in ()).throw(AssertionError("fallback copy should not run")),
    )

    result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task, str(source))

    assert result.get("output_path") == str(expected_output)
    assert result.get("executed_mode") == "video_pipeline"
    executed = result.get("executed_stages") or []
    assert "stage1_transcode" in executed
    assert "stage8_cover" in executed
    assert captured["config_output_dir"] == str(Path(cfg.output_dir))
    assert captured["input_video"] == str(source)
    assert captured["task_id"] == task.task_id
    assert captured["start_from_stage"] == 0
    assert captured["forum_post_info"] == {"thread_id": "123", "title": "topic"}
    assert captured["clip_text"] == "user supplied clip text"
    assert task.current_stage == 11
    assert task.stage_checkpoint == "stage9_organize"
    assert (Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "forum_post_info.json").exists()
    assert (Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "clip_text.txt").exists()
    state_payload = json.loads((Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "state.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    assert state_payload["last_completed_step"] == 9
    assert state_payload["last_completed_step_name"] == "stage9_organize"
    assert state_payload["output_file"] == str(expected_output)


def test_attach_video_render_manifest_collects_primary_subtitle_cover_and_state(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_render_manifest.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / "render-manifest-task"

+def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_preserves_user_clip_text_into_stage6(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_real_pipeline.db"))
+    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
+    cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
+    service = WorkerService(cfg)
+
+    source = tmp_path / "real-pipeline-source.mp4"
+    source.write_bytes(b"video-content" * 128)
+    task = UnifiedTask(
+        task_id="real-pipeline-clip-text-1",
+        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
+        source="unit",
+        source_path=str(source),
+        payload={"clip_text": "user supplied clip text"},
+        metadata={"source": "unit", "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123"}},
+    )
+
+    final_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "final.mp4"
+
+    def passthrough_stage(input_video, output_dir, task_id, *args, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+        _ = output_dir
+        _ = task_id
+        _ = args
+        _ = kwargs
+        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(input_video))
+
+    def assert_clip_text_stage6(input_video, output_dir, task_id):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+        clip_text_path = Path(output_dir) / task_id / "clip_text.txt"
+        assert clip_text_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8") == "user supplied clip text"
+        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(input_video))
+
+    def finalize_stage9(
+        input_video,
+        *,
+        output_dir,
+        task_id,
+        keep_intermediate_files=False,
+        forum_post_info=None,
+        original_filename="",
+    ):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+        _ = input_video
+        _ = keep_intermediate_files
+        _ = forum_post_info
+        _ = original_filename
+        final_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+        final_output.write_bytes(b"final-video")
+        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(final_output))
+
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage0_clean", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage1_transcode", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage2_silence", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage3_repair", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage4_asr", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_clip", assert_clip_text_stage6)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_5_resub", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_correct", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_subtitle", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage8_cover", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage9_organize", finalize_stage9)
+
+    result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task, str(source))
+
+    assert result.get("output_path") == str(final_output)
+    assert result.get("executed_mode") == "video_pipeline"
+    assert (Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "clip_text.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8") == (
+        "user supplied clip text"
+    )
+
+
 def test_attach_video_render_manifest_collects_primary_subtitle_cover_and_state(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_render_manifest.db"))
     cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
     service = WorkerService(cfg)
*** End Patch
